title: Decidable By Construction: Design-Time Verification for Trustworthy AI
authors: Houston Haynes
abstract: A prevailing assumption in machine learning is that model correctness must be enforced after the fact. We observe that the properties determining whether an AI model is numerically stable, computationally correct, or consistent with a physical domain do not necessarily demand post hoc enforcement. They can be verified at design time, before training begins, at marginal computational cost, with particular relevance to models deployed in high-leverage decision support and scientifically constrained settings. These properties share a specific algebraic structure: they are expressible as constraints over finitely generated abelian groups $\mathbb{Z}^n$, where inference is decidable in polynomial time and the principal type is unique. A framework built on this observation composes three prior results (arXiv:2603.16437, arXiv:2603.17627, arXiv:2603.18104): a dimensional type system carrying arbitrary annotations as persistent codata through model elaboration; a program hypergraph that infers Clifford algebra grade and derives geometric product sparsity from type signatures alone; and an adaptive domain model architecture preserving both invariants through training via forward-mode coeffect analysis and exact posit accumulation. We believe this composition yields a novel information-theoretic result: Hindley-Milner unification over abelian groups computes the maximum a posteriori hypothesis under a computable restriction of Solomonoff's universal prior, placing the framework's type inference on the same formal ground as universal induction. We compare four contemporary approaches to AI reliability and show that each imposes overhead that can compound across deployments, layers, and inference requests. This framework eliminates that overhead by construction.
title_zh: 可判定的构造：可信人工智能的设计阶段验证
abstract_zh: 机器学习领域的一个普遍假设是，模型的正确性必须在事后进行强制。我们观察到，决定一个AI模型是否数值稳定、计算正确或与物理领域一致的性质，并不一定需要事后强制。这些性质可以在设计阶段——在训练开始之前——以极低的计算成本进行验证，尤其适用于高影响力决策支持和科学约束场景中的模型部署。这些性质具有特定的代数结构：它们可表示为有限生成阿贝尔群 $\mathbb{Z}^n$ 上的约束，其中推理可在多项式时间内判定，且主类型唯一。基于这一观察，我们构建了一个框架，整合了三个先前成果（arXiv:2603.16437, arXiv:2603.17627, arXiv:2603.18104）：一种携带任意注解作为持久共数据通过模型展开的维度类型系统；一种程序超图，仅从类型签名即可推断克利福德代数的阶并导出几何积的稀疏性；以及一种自适应域模型架构，通过前向模式共效应分析和精确正数累积，在训练过程中保持这两种不变量。我们认为，这种组合带来了一个新颖的信息论结果：在阿贝尔群上的Hindley-Milner合一算法，计算的是在可计算的索洛莫诺夫通用先验限制下的最大后验假设，使该框架的类型推断具备与通用归纳相同的严格形式基础。我们对比了四种当代AI可靠性方法，发现每种方法都会引入开销，而这些开销可能在部署、层级和推理请求之间累积。本框架则通过构造从根本上消除了此类开销。

title: Does Structured Intent Representation Generalize? A Cross-Language, Cross-Model Empirical Study of 5W3H Prompting
authors: Peng Gang
abstract: Does structured intent representation generalize across languages and models? We study PPS (Prompt Protocol Specification), a 5W3H-based framework for structured intent representation in human-AI interaction, and extend prior Chinese-only evidence along three dimensions: two additional languages (English and Japanese), a fourth condition in which a user's simple prompt is automatically expanded into a full 5W3H specification by an AI-assisted authoring interface, and a new research question on cross-model output consistency. Across 2,160 model outputs (3 languages x 4 conditions x 3 LLMs x 60 tasks), we find that AI-expanded 5W3H prompts (Condition D) show no statistically significant difference in goal alignment from manually crafted 5W3H prompts (Condition C) across all three languages, while requiring only a single-sentence input from the user. Structured PPS conditions often reduce or reshape cross-model output variance, though this effect is not uniform across languages and metrics; the strongest evidence comes from identifying spurious low variance in unconstrained baselines. We also show that unstructured prompts exhibit a systematic dual-inflation bias: artificially high composite scores and artificially low apparent cross-model variance. These findings suggest that structured 5W3H representations can improve intent alignment and accessibility across languages and models, especially when AI-assisted authoring lowers the barrier for non-expert users.
title_zh: 结构化意图表示是否具有泛化能力？基于5W3H提示的跨语言、跨模型实证研究
abstract_zh: 结构化意图表示是否具有跨语言和模型的泛化能力？我们研究了PPS（提示协议规范）——一种基于5W3H框架的结构化意图表示方法，用于人机交互，并在三个维度上扩展了以往仅限中文的证据：新增两种语言（英语和日语）、引入第四种条件，即由AI辅助创作界面自动将用户的简单提示扩展为完整的5W3H规范，以及提出一个关于跨模型输出一致性的新研究问题。在总计2,160个模型输出（3种语言 × 4种条件 × 3个大语言模型 × 60个任务）中，我们发现AI扩展的5W3H提示（条件D）在所有三种语言中与人工精心设计的5W3H提示（条件C）在目标对齐性方面无统计学显著差异，同时仅需用户输入单句即可完成。结构化的PPS条件通常能降低或重塑跨模型输出方差，尽管这一效果在不同语言和评估指标间并不一致；最有力的证据来自揭示非约束基线中存在虚假的低方差现象。此外，我们还发现非结构化提示表现出系统性的双重膨胀偏差：复合评分被人为抬高，而跨模型方差则被人为低估。这些结果表明，结构化的5W3H表示能够提升多语言、多模型场景下的意图对齐性和可用性，尤其当AI辅助创作降低了非专业用户使用门槛时更为显著。

title: Large Language Model as Token Compressor and Decompressor
authors: Wenbing Li, Zikai Song, Jielei Zhang, Tianhao Zhao, Junkai Lin, Yiran Wang, Wei Yang
abstract: In this paper, we establish the novel insight that an off-the-shelf LLM can function as an excellent token compressor and decompressor. To demonstrate, we design a self-expressive autoencoding learning framework fine-tunes a pretrained LLM to translate long texts into a compact internal language of discrete, variable-length latent codes, termed Z-tokens, and to reconstruct the original text exactly from them. The resulting representation is content-adaptive: semantically dense segments receive more Z-tokens, while redundant or predictable regions are aggressively compressed, via lightweight LoRA-based adapter heads. Empirically, our method achieves up to 18 times token reduction on Wikipedia, CNN/DailyMail, HotpotQA, and Qulac-style long-query datasets, while preserving reconstruction fidelity and downstream performance. This simple yet effective design supports applications including prompt compression and autoregressive generation directly in the Z-token space, offering a potential pathway toward token-efficient long-context reasoning.
title_zh: 大语言模型作为标记压缩与解压缩器
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一项新颖的见解：现成的大型语言模型（LLM）可作为出色的词元压缩与解压缩工具。为验证这一观点，我们设计了一种自表达的自编码学习框架，通过微调预训练LLM，将长文本转换为紧凑的内部离散、可变长度潜在代码——称为Z-token，并能从这些Z-token中精确重建原始文本。该表示方法具有内容自适应性：语义密集的段落会分配更多Z-token，而冗余或可预测的部分则被大幅压缩，这一过程通过轻量级的LoRA适配器头实现。实验结果表明，我们的方法在维基百科、CNN/DailyMail、HotpotQA以及Qulac风格的长查询数据集上，实现了最高达18倍的词元压缩率，同时保持了高重建保真度和下游任务性能。这一简单而高效的设计支持提示压缩、直接在Z-token空间中进行自回归生成等应用，为实现高效的长上下文推理提供了一条可行路径。

title: FluxEDA: A Unified Execution Infrastructure for Stateful Agentic EDA
authors: Zhengrui Chen, Zixuan Song, Yu Li, Qi Sun, Cheng Zhuo
abstract: Large language models and autonomous agents are increasingly explored for EDA automation, but many existing integrations still rely on script-level or request-level interactions, which makes it difficult to preserve tool state and support iterative optimization in real production-oriented environments. In this work, we present FluxEDA, a unified and stateful infrastructure substrate for agentic EDA. FluxEDA introduces a managed gateway-based execution interface with structured request and response handling. It also maintains persistent backend instances. Together, these features allow upper-layer agents and programmable clients to interact with heterogeneous EDA tools through preserved runtime state, rather than through isolated shell invocations. We evaluate the framework using two representative commercial backend case studies: automated post-route timing ECO and standard-cell sub-library optimization. The results show that FluxEDA can support multi-step analysis and optimization over real tool contexts, including state reuse, rollback, and coordinated iterative execution. These findings suggest that a stateful and governed infrastructure layer is a practical foundation for agent-assisted EDA automation.
title_zh: FluxEDA：面向有状态智能体EDA的统一执行基础设施
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型与自主代理正被越来越多地探索用于电子设计自动化（EDA）的自动化，但现有许多集成仍依赖于脚本级或请求级的交互方式，这使得在实际生产环境中难以保持工具状态，也难以支持迭代优化。本文提出 FluxEDA，一种统一且具备状态管理能力的智能体式 EDA 基础设施框架。FluxEDA 引入基于托管网关的执行接口，实现结构化请求与响应处理，并维护持久化的后端实例。这些特性共同使上层智能体和可编程客户端能够通过保留的运行时状态与异构 EDA 工具进行交互，而非依赖孤立的 shell 调用。我们通过两个具有代表性的商业后端案例研究对框架进行了评估：自动布线后时序修复（post-route timing ECO）和标准单元子库优化。实验结果表明，FluxEDA 能够在真实的工具上下文中支持多步骤分析与优化，包括状态复用、回滚以及协调一致的迭代执行。这些发现表明，具备状态管理和治理能力的基础架构层，是实现智能体辅助 EDA 自动化的切实可行基础。

title: The Competence Shadow: Theory and Bounds of AI Assistance in Safety Engineering
authors: Umair Siddique
abstract: As AI assistants become integrated into safety engineering workflows for Physical AI systems, a critical question emerges: does AI assistance improve safety analysis quality, or introduce systematic blind spots that surface only through post-deployment incidents? This paper develops a formal framework for AI assistance in safety analysis. We first establish why safety engineering resists benchmark-driven evaluation: safety competence is irreducibly multidimensional, constrained by context-dependent correctness, inherent incompleteness, and legitimate expert disagreement. We formalize this through a five-dimensional competence framework capturing domain knowledge, standards expertise, operational experience, contextual understanding, and judgment. We introduce the competence shadow: the systematic narrowing of human reasoning induced by AI-generated safety analysis. The shadow is not what the AI presents, but what it prevents from being considered. We formalize four canonical human-AI collaboration structures and derive closed-form performance bounds, demonstrating that the competence shadow compounds multiplicatively to produce degradation far exceeding naive additive estimates. The central finding is that AI assistance in safety engineering is a collaboration design problem, not a software procurement decision. The same tool degrades or improves analysis quality depending entirely on how it is used. We derive non-degradation conditions for shadow-resistant workflows and call for a shift from tool qualification toward workflow qualification for trustworthy Physical AI.
title_zh: 能力阴影：人工智能在安全工程中辅助作用的理论与边界
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能助手逐渐融入物理人工智能系统安全工程的工作流程，一个关键问题浮现：AI辅助是否真正提升了安全分析的质量，还是引入了只有在部署后才会暴露的系统性盲点？本文构建了一个关于AI辅助在安全分析中应用的形式化框架。我们首先阐明为何安全工程难以通过基准测试进行评估：安全能力本质上是多维度的，受限于情境依赖的正确性、固有的不完整性以及合理的专家分歧。为此，我们提出一个五维能力框架，涵盖领域知识、标准专长、操作经验、情境理解与判断力。我们引入“能力阴影”（competence shadow）这一概念——指AI生成的安全分析对人类推理所造成的系统性局限。这种阴影并非AI呈现的内容，而是它阻止人类考虑的内容。我们形式化了四种典型的“人机协作”结构，并推导出其性能的闭式边界，证明能力阴影会以乘法方式累积，导致性能退化远超简单的加法估算。核心发现是：AI在安全工程中的应用是一个协作设计问题，而非软件采购决策。同一工具的使用方式决定了其是提升还是降低分析质量。我们进一步推导出避免性能下降的条件，提出了从“工具认证”转向“工作流程认证”的必要性，以实现可信的物理人工智能系统。

title: The System Prompt Is the Attack Surface: How LLM Agent Configuration Shapes Security and Creates Exploitable Vulnerabilities
authors: Ron Litvak
abstract: System prompt configuration can make the difference between near-total phishing blindness and near-perfect detection in LLM email agents. We present PhishNChips, a study of 11 models under 10 prompt strategies, showing that prompt-model interaction is a first-order security variable: a single model's phishing bypass rate ranges from under 1% to 97% depending on how it is configured, while the false-positive cost of the same prompt varies sharply across models. We then show that optimizing prompts around highly predictive signals can improve benchmark performance, reaching up to 93.7% recall at 3.8% false positive rate, but also creates a brittle attack surface. In particular, domain-matching strategies perform well when legitimate emails mostly have matched sender and URL domains, yet degrade sharply when attackers invert that signal by registering matching infrastructure. Response-trace analysis shows that 98% of successful bypasses reason in ways consistent with the inverted signal: the models are following the instruction, but the instruction's core assumption has become false. A counter-intuitive corollary follows: making prompts more specific can degrade already-capable models by replacing broader multi-signal reasoning with exploitable single-signal dependence. We characterize the resulting tension between detection, usability, and adversarial robustness as a navigable tradeoff, introduce Safetility, a deployability-aware metric that penalizes false positives, and argue that closing the adversarial gap likely requires tool augmentation with external ground truth.
title_zh: 系统提示是攻击面：大语言模型代理配置如何塑造安全态势并产生可被利用的漏洞
abstract_zh: 系统提示配置能够使大型语言模型邮件代理在近乎完全无法识别钓鱼邮件与近乎完美检测之间产生巨大差异。我们提出了PhishNChips，对11种模型在10种提示策略下的表现进行了研究，结果表明，提示与模型之间的交互是一个关键的安全变量：同一模型在不同配置下，其绕过钓鱼攻击的比率可从不足1%飙升至97%；而同一提示策略在不同模型上的误报成本也表现出显著差异。随后我们发现，围绕高度预测性的信号优化提示，可以显著提升基准性能，实现高达93.7%的召回率，同时将误报率控制在3.8%以内，但同时也带来了脆弱的攻击面。特别地，当合法邮件的发件人域名与URL域名基本匹配时，基于域名匹配的策略表现良好，但一旦攻击者通过注册匹配的基础设施反转这一信号，其性能便急剧下降。响应追踪分析显示，98%的成功绕过案例都表现出与反转信号一致的推理方式：模型严格遵循了指令，但指令所依赖的核心假设已不再成立。一个反直觉的推论随之而来：使提示更加具体，反而可能削弱原本具备较强能力的模型，因为这会用可被利用的单一信号依赖取代更广泛、多信号融合的推理机制。我们把检测能力、可用性与对抗鲁棒性之间的张力定义为一种可权衡的导航空间，提出Safetility——一个考虑部署可行性的度量指标，该指标对误报进行惩罚，并主张要真正弥合对抗差距，很可能需要借助外部真实信息的工具增强。

title: AutoPDR: Circuit-Aware Solver Configuration Prediction for Hardware Model Checking
authors: Guangyu Hu, Chen Chen, Xiaofeng Zhou, Jiaxi Zhang, Wei Zhang, Hongce Zhang
abstract: Property Directed Reachability (PDR) is a powerful algorithm for formal verification of hardware and software systems, but its performance is highly sensitive to parameter configurations. Manual parameter tuning is time-consuming and requires domain expertise, while traditional automated parameter tuning frameworks are not well-suited for time-sensitive verification tasks like PDR. This paper presents a circuit-aware solver configuration framework that employs graph learning for intelligent heuristic selection in PDR-based verification. Our approach combines graph representations with static circuit features to predict optimal PDR solving configurations for specific circuits. We incorporate expert prior knowledge through constraint-based parameter filtering to eliminate invalid and inefficient configurations and reduce 78% search space. Our feature extraction pipeline captures structural, functional, and connectivity characteristics of circuit topology and component patterns. Experimental evaluation on a comprehensive benchmark suite demonstrates significant performance improvements compared to default configurations and commonly-used settings. The system successfully identifies circuit-specific parameter patterns and automatically selects the most suitable solving strategies based on circuit characteristics, making it a practical tool for automated formal verification workflows.
title_zh: AutoPDR：面向硬件模型检测的电路感知求解器配置预测
abstract_zh: 属性导向可达性（PDR）是一种强大的硬件与软件系统形式化验证算法，但其性能对参数配置极为敏感。手动调参耗时且需要领域专业知识，而传统的自动化参数调优框架又不适用于PDR这类对时间敏感的验证任务。本文提出了一种电路感知的求解器配置框架，采用图学习技术实现PDR验证中智能启发式选择。我们的方法结合图表示与静态电路特征，预测特定电路的最优PDR求解配置。通过基于约束的参数过滤引入专家先验知识，有效剔除无效和低效配置，将搜索空间缩小78%。特征提取流程捕捉了电路拓扑结构、功能特性以及组件连接模式等多方面信息。在全面的基准测试集上的实验评估表明，该方法相比默认配置和常用设置均取得了显著的性能提升。系统能够成功识别出电路特异性的参数模式，并根据电路特征自动选择最合适的求解策略，因而成为自动化形式化验证工作流中一项实用工具。

title: GraphER: An Efficient Graph-Based Enrichment and Reranking Method for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
authors: Ruizhong Miao, Yuying Wang, Rongguang Wang, Chenyang Li, Tao Sheng, Sujith Ravi, Dan Roth
abstract: Semantic search in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems is often insufficient for complex information needs, particularly when relevant evidence is scattered across multiple sources. Prior approaches to this problem include agentic retrieval strategies, which expand the semantic search space by generating additional queries. However, these methods do not fully leverage the organizational structure of the data and instead rely on iterative exploration, which can lead to inefficient retrieval. Another class of approaches employs knowledge graphs to model non-semantic relationships through graph edges. Although effective in capturing richer proximities, such methods incur significant maintenance costs and are often incompatible with the vector stores used in most production systems. To address these limitations, we propose GraphER, a graph-based enrichment and reranking method that captures multiple forms of proximity beyond semantic similarity. GraphER independently enriches data objects during offline indexing and performs graph-based reranking over candidate objects at query time. This design does not require a knowledge graph, allowing GraphER to integrate seamlessly with standard vector stores. In addition, GraphER is retriever-agnostic and introduces negligible latency overhead. Experiments on multiple retrieval benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
title_zh: GraphER：一种高效的基于图的增强与重排序方法，用于检索增强型生成
abstract_zh: 在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中，语义搜索往往难以满足复杂的信息需求，尤其是在相关证据分散于多个来源的情况下。针对这一问题，先前的方法包括代理式检索策略，通过生成额外查询来扩展语义搜索范围。然而，这些方法未能充分利用数据的组织结构，而是依赖迭代探索，可能导致检索效率低下。另一类方法则利用知识图谱，通过图边建模非语义关系。尽管这类方法在捕捉更丰富的邻近性方面表现良好，但其维护成本较高，且通常与大多数生产系统中使用的向量存储不兼容。为克服上述局限，我们提出 GraphER——一种基于图的增强与重排序方法，能够捕捉超越语义相似性的多种邻近关系。GraphER 在离线索引阶段独立对数据对象进行增强，并在查询时对候选对象执行基于图的重排序。该设计无需依赖知识图谱，因而可无缝集成至标准向量存储系统。此外，GraphER 兼容任意检索器，引入的延迟开销可忽略不计。在多个检索基准上的实验表明，所提方法具有显著有效性。

title: On the Foundations of Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence
authors: TJ Dunham
abstract: We prove that platform-deterministic inference is necessary and sufficient for trustworthy AI. We formalize this as the Determinism Thesis and introduce trust entropy to quantify the cost of non-determinism, proving that verification failure probability equals 1 - 2^{-H_T} exactly. We prove a Determinism-Verification Collapse: verification under determinism requires O(1) hash comparison; without it, the verifier faces an intractable membership problem. IEEE 754 floating-point arithmetic fundamentally violates the determinism requirement. We resolve this by constructing a pure integer inference engine that achieves bitwise identical output across ARM and x86. In 82 cross-architecture tests on models up to 6.7B parameters, we observe zero hash mismatches. Four geographically distributed nodes produce identical outputs, verified by 356 on-chain attestation transactions. Every major trust property of AI systems (fairness, robustness, privacy, safety, alignment) presupposes platform determinism. Our system, 99,000 lines of Rust deployed across three continents, establishes that AI trust is a question of arithmetic.
title_zh: 可信人工智能的基石
abstract_zh: 我们证明，平台确定性推断是可信人工智能的必要且充分条件。我们将这一观点形式化为“确定性假说”，并引入信任熵（trust entropy）来量化非确定性的代价，证明验证失败概率恰好等于 $1 - 2^{-H_T}$。我们进一步证明了“确定性-验证坍缩定理”：在确定性条件下，验证仅需 $O(1)$ 次哈希比较；而若缺乏确定性，验证者将面临难以处理的成员资格问题。IEEE 754 浮点数算术从根本上违背了确定性要求。为此，我们构建了一个纯整数推理引擎，实现了在 ARM 和 x86 架构间比特级完全一致的输出。在包含高达 67 亿参数模型的 82 次跨架构测试中，我们观察到零次哈希不匹配。四个地理分布节点生成完全相同的输出，并通过 356 笔链上认证交易得到验证。人工智能系统的所有主要可信属性（公平性、鲁棒性、隐私性、安全性、对齐性）均以平台确定性为前提。我们的系统由 99,000 行 Rust 代码构成，部署于三大洲，确立了人工智能的信任本质上是一个算术问题。

title: Natural-Language Agent Harnesses
authors: Linyue Pan, Lexiao Zou, Shuo Guo, Jingchen Ni, Hai-Tao Zheng
abstract: Agent performance increasingly depends on \emph{harness engineering}, yet harness design is usually buried in controller code and runtime-specific conventions, making it hard to transfer, compare, and study as a scientific object. We ask whether the high-level control logic of an agent harness can instead be externalized as a portable executable artifact. We introduce \textbf{Natural-Language Agent Harnesses} (NLAHs), which express harness behavior in editable natural language, and \textbf{Intelligent Harness Runtime} (IHR), a shared runtime that executes these harnesses through explicit contracts, durable artifacts, and lightweight adapters. Across coding and computer-use benchmarks, we conduct controlled evaluations of operational viability, module ablation, and code-to-text harness migration.
title_zh: 自然语言代理的利用
abstract_zh: 代理性能越来越依赖于** harness 工程**，然而 harness 的设计通常被嵌入控制器代码和特定运行时的约定中，难以作为科学对象进行迁移、比较与研究。我们提出：是否可以将代理 harness 的高层控制逻辑外化为一种可移植的可执行实体？为此，我们引入了**自然语言代理 harness**（Natural-Language Agent Harnesses, NLAHs），以可编辑的自然语言表达 harness 的行为；并提出了**智能 harness 运行时**（Intelligent Harness Runtime, IHR），一个共享的运行时环境，通过明确的契约、持久化的产物以及轻量级适配器来执行这些 harness。在编程与计算机使用基准测试中，我们开展了受控评估，考察了其操作可行性、模块消融效果，以及从代码到文本的 harness 迁移能力。

title: Are LLMs Overkill for Databases?: A Study on the Finiteness of SQL
authors: Yue Li, David Mimno, Unso Eun Seo Jo
abstract: Translating natural language to SQL for data retrieval has become more accessible thanks to code generation LLMs. But how hard is it to generate SQL code? While databases can become unbounded in complexity, the complexity of queries is bounded by real life utility and human needs. With a sample of 376 databases, we show that SQL queries, as translations of natural language questions are finite in practical complexity. There is no clear monotonic relationship between increases in database table count and increases in complexity of SQL queries. In their template forms, SQL queries follow a Power Law-like distribution of frequency where 70% of our tested queries can be covered with just 13% of all template types, indicating that the high majority of SQL queries are predictable. This suggests that while LLMs for code generation can be useful, in the domain of database access, they may be operating in a narrow, highly formulaic space where templates could be safer, cheaper, and auditable.
title_zh: 大语言模型对数据库是否过于强大？——关于SQL有限性的研究
abstract_zh: 得益于代码生成型大语言模型（LLM）的发展，将自然语言翻译为SQL以实现数据检索变得越来越容易。但生成SQL代码究竟有多难？尽管数据库的复杂性可能无限增长，但实际查询的复杂性却受到现实用途和人类需求的限制。通过对376个数据库样本的研究，我们发现：作为自然语言问题翻译结果的SQL查询，在实际应用中其复杂性是有限的。数据库表数量的增加，并不必然导致SQL查询复杂性的单调上升。在模板化形式下，SQL查询的出现频率呈现出类似幂律分布的特征——仅用所有模板类型中的13%，就能覆盖我们测试过的70%的查询，这表明绝大多数SQL查询具有高度可预测性。这一发现暗示，尽管代码生成类LLM在某些场景下具有实用性，但在数据库访问领域，它们实际上可能运行在一个狭窄且高度模式化的空间中。在此情境下，使用模板不仅更安全、成本更低，也更容易进行审计。

title: LACY: Simulating Expert Mentoring for Software Onboarding with Code Tours
authors: Zeynep Begüm Kara, Aytekin İsmail, Ece Ateş, İzgi Nur Tamcı, Zehra İyigün, Selin Şirin Aslangül, Ömercan Devran, Baykal Mehmet Uçar, Eray Tüzün
abstract: Every software organization faces the onboarding challenge: helping newcomers navigate complex codebases, compensate for insufficient documentation, and comprehend code they did not author. Expert walkthroughs are among the most effective forms of support, yet they are expensive, repetitive, and do not scale. We present Lacy, a hybrid human-AI onboarding system that captures expert mentoring in reusable code tours-to our knowledge, the first hybrid approach combining AI-generated content with expert curation in code tours. Our design is grounded in requirements derived from 20+ meetings, surveys, and interviews across a year-long industry partnership with Beko. Supporting features include Voice-to-Tour capture, comprehension quizzes, podcasts, and a dashboard. We deployed Lacy on Beko's production environment and conducted a controlled study on a legacy finance system (30K+ LOC). Learners using expert-guided tours achieved 83% quiz scores versus 57% for AI-only tours, preferred tours over traditional self-study, and reported they would need fewer expert consultations. Experts found tour creation less burdensome than live walkthroughs. Beko has since adopted Lacy for organizational onboarding, and we release our code and study instruments as a replication package.
title_zh: LACY：通过代码导览实现软件入职的专家指导模拟
abstract_zh: 每个软件组织都面临着入职培训的挑战：帮助新成员理解复杂的代码库，弥补文档不足的问题，并理解自己未曾编写的代码。专家指导式讲解是支持新手最有效的方式之一，但这种方式成本高昂、重复性强且难以扩展。我们提出了Lacy——一种混合型人机协作的入职系统，能够将专家指导转化为可复用的代码导览。据我们所知，这是首个结合AI生成内容与专家审校的代码导览混合方法。我们的设计基于与Beko长达一年的产业合作中开展的20余次会议、调查和访谈所提炼出的需求。系统支持语音转导览、理解测验、播客功能以及仪表板等特性。我们在Beko的生产环境中部署了Lacy，并对一个遗留金融系统（超过3万行代码）进行了受控实验。结果显示，使用专家引导导览的学习者在测验中平均得分达到83%，而仅使用AI生成导览的学习者仅为57%；学习者更偏好导览形式而非传统自学方式，并表示需要的专家咨询次数显著减少。专家也反馈，创建导览比进行实时讲解更为轻松。目前，Beko已正式采用Lacy作为组织级入职工具。我们已将代码及研究工具打包发布，以供后续复现。

title: Factors Influencing the Quality of AI-Generated Code: A Synthesis of Empirical Evidence
authors: Vehid Geruslu, Zulfiyya Aliyeva, Eray Tüzün
abstract: Context: The rapid adoption of AI-assisted code generation tools, such as large language models (LLMs), is transforming software development practices. While these tools promise significant productivity gains, concerns regarding the quality, reliability, and security of AI-generated code are increasingly reported in both academia and industry. --Objective: This study aims to systematically synthesize existing empirical evidence on the factors influencing the quality of AI-generated source code and to analyze how these factors impact software quality outcomes across different evaluation contexts. --Method: We conducted a systematic literature review (SLR) following established guidelines, supported by an AI-assisted workflow with human oversight. A total of 24 primary studies were selected through a structured search and screening process across major digital libraries. Data were extracted and analyzed using qualitative, pattern-based evidence synthesis. --Results: The findings reveal that code quality in AI-assisted development is influenced by a combination of human factors, AI system characteristics, and human AI interaction dynamics. Key influencing factors include prompt design, task specification, and developer expertise. The results also show variability in quality outcomes such as correctness, security, maintainability, and complexity across studies, with both improvements and risks reported. --Conclusion: AI-assisted code generation represents a socio-technical shift in software engineering, where achieving high-quality outcomes depends on both technological and human factors. While promising, AI-generated code requires careful validation and integration into development workflows.
title_zh: 影响AI生成代码质量的因素：实证证据的综合分析
abstract_zh:
背景：以大型语言模型（LLMs）为代表的AI辅助代码生成工具的快速普及，正在深刻改变软件开发实践。尽管这些工具有望显著提升开发效率，但学术界与产业界对AI生成代码在质量、可靠性及安全性方面的担忧日益增多。

目标：本研究旨在系统性地综合现有实证证据，探讨影响AI生成源代码质量的关键因素，并分析这些因素在不同评估情境下对软件质量结果的影响。

方法：我们遵循既定指南开展系统文献综述（SLR），并采用AI辅助工作流结合人工监督的方式进行。通过在主要数字图书馆中进行结构化检索与筛选，共选取24项原始研究。数据采用基于模式的定性证据综合方法进行提取与分析。

结果：研究发现，AI辅助开发中的代码质量受人类因素、AI系统特性以及人机交互动态的共同影响。关键影响因素包括提示词设计、任务说明清晰度以及开发人员的专业能力。研究结果还显示，不同研究中代码质量表现存在差异，具体体现在正确性、安全性、可维护性和复杂度等方面，既有性能提升的报告，也存在潜在风险。

结论：AI辅助代码生成标志着软件工程领域的一次社会技术转型，高质量成果的实现依赖于技术与人为因素的协同作用。尽管前景广阔，AI生成代码仍需经过审慎验证，并有效整合进开发流程之中。

title: Closing the Confidence-Faithfulness Gap in Large Language Models
authors: Miranda Muqing Miao, Lyle Ungar
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) tend to verbalize confidence scores that are largely detached from their actual accuracy, yet the geometric relationship governing this behavior remain poorly understood. In this work, we present a mechanistic interpretability analysis of verbalized confidence, using linear probes and contrastive activation addition (CAA) steering to show that calibration and verbalized confidence signals are encoded linearly but are orthogonal to one another -- a finding consistent across three open-weight models and four datasets. Interestingly, when models are prompted to simultaneously reason through a problem and verbalize a confidence score, the reasoning process disrupts the verbalized confidence direction, exacerbating miscalibration. We term this the "Reasoning Contamination Effect." Leveraging this insight, we introduce a two-stage adaptive steering pipeline that reads the model's internal accuracy estimate and steers verbalized output to match it, substantially improving calibration alignment across all evaluated models.
title_zh: 缩小大型语言模型中的置信度-忠实度差距
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）往往会产生与其实际准确性脱节的置信度评分，而这种行为背后的几何关系仍不清晰。在本研究中，我们通过线性探测和对比激活添加（CAA）控制方法，对模型生成的置信度进行了机制可解释性分析，发现置信度信号与校准信息虽均以线性方式编码，但彼此正交——这一现象在三个开源权重模型及四个数据集上均得到验证。有趣的是，当模型被要求同时进行问题推理并输出置信度评分时，推理过程会干扰置信度方向，从而加剧校准偏差。我们称此现象为“推理污染效应”。基于这一发现，我们提出了一种两阶段自适应控制管道，能够读取模型内部的准确率估计，并引导其输出置信度以匹配该估计，显著提升了所有评估模型的校准一致性。

title: Trace2Skill: Distill Trajectory-Local Lessons into Transferable Agent Skills
authors: Jingwei Ni, Yihao Liu, Xinpeng Liu, Yutao Sun, Mengyu Zhou, Pengyu Cheng, Dexin Wang, Xiaoxi Jiang, Guanjun Jiang
abstract: Equipping Large Language Model (LLM) agents with domain-specific skills is critical for tackling complex tasks. Yet, manual authoring creates a severe scalability bottleneck. Conversely, automated skill generation often yields fragile or fragmented results because it either relies on shallow parametric knowledge or sequentially overfits to non-generalizable trajectory-local lessons. To overcome this, we introduce Trace2Skill, a framework that mirrors how human experts author skills: by holistically analyzing broad execution experience before distilling it into a single, comprehensive guide. Instead of reacting sequentially to individual trajectories, Trace2Skill dispatches a parallel fleet of sub-agents to analyze a diverse pool of executions. It extracts trajectory-specific lessons and hierarchically consolidates them into a unified, conflict-free skill directory via inductive reasoning. Trace2Skill supports both deepening existing human-written skills and creating new ones from scratch. Experiments in challenging domains, such as spreadsheet, VisionQA and math reasoning, show that Trace2Skill significantly improves upon strong baselines, including Anthropic's official xlsx skills. Crucially, this trajectory-grounded evolution does not merely memorize task instances or model-specific quirks: evolved skills transfer across LLM scales and generalize to OOD settings. For example, skills evolved by Qwen3.5-35B on its own trajectories improved a Qwen3.5-122B agent by up to 57.65 absolute percentage points on WikiTableQuestions. Ultimately, our results demonstrate that complex agent experience can be packaged into highly transferable, declarative skills -- requiring no parameter updates, no external retrieval modules, and utilizing open-source models as small as 35B parameters.
title_zh: Trace2Skill：将轨迹局部经验提炼为可迁移的智能体技能
abstract_zh: 为大型语言模型（LLM）代理配备领域特定技能，是应对复杂任务的关键。然而，手动编写技能会带来严重的可扩展性瓶颈。相反，自动化技能生成往往产生脆弱或碎片化的结果，因为它要么依赖浅层参数化知识，要么在非泛化性的轨迹局部经验上进行顺序过拟合。为克服这一挑战，我们提出Trace2Skill框架，其理念模仿人类专家构建技能的方式：通过整体分析广泛的执行经验，再将其提炼为单一、全面的指导手册。与逐个响应单条轨迹的传统方法不同，Trace2Skill并行调度一组子代理，对多样化的执行过程进行分析。它提取每条轨迹的独特经验，并通过归纳推理，将这些经验分层整合成一个统一且无冲突的技能目录。Trace2Skill既支持深化已有手工编写的技能，也能从零开始创建全新技能。在电子表格、视觉问答（VisionQA）和数学推理等具有挑战性的领域中进行的实验表明，Trace2Skill显著优于多个强大基线模型，包括Anthropic官方发布的xlsx技能。尤为重要的是，这种基于轨迹演进的机制并非简单记忆任务实例或模型特有缺陷：所生成的技能具备跨LLM规模的迁移能力，并能在分布外（OOD）场景中实现良好泛化。例如，由Qwen3.5-35B在自身执行轨迹上演化出的技能，使Qwen3.5-122B代理在WikiTableQuestions任务上的性能提升了高达57.65个百分点。最终，我们的研究证明：复杂的代理经验可以被封装为高度可迁移、声明式的技能——无需参数更新、无需外部检索模块，仅使用最小规模达350亿参数的开源模型即可实现。

title: Agent Factories for High Level Synthesis: How Far Can General-Purpose Coding Agents Go in Hardware Optimization?
authors: Abhishek Bhandwaldar, Mihir Choudhury, Ruchir Puri, Akash Srivastava
abstract: We present an empirical study of how far general-purpose coding agents -- without hardware-specific training -- can optimize hardware designs from high-level algorithmic specifications. We introduce an agent factory, a two-stage pipeline that constructs and coordinates multiple autonomous optimization agents. In Stage~1, the pipeline decomposes a design into sub-kernels, independently optimizes each using pragma and code-level transformations, and formulates an Integer Linear Program (ILP) to assemble globally promising configurations under an area constraint. In Stage~2, it launches $N$ expert agents over the top ILP solutions, each exploring cross-function optimizations such as pragma recombination, loop fusion, and memory restructuring that are not captured by sub-kernel decomposition. We evaluate the approach on 12 kernels from HLS-Eval and Rodinia-HLS using Claude Code (Opus~4.5/4.6) with AMD Vitis HLS. Scaling from 1 to 10 agents yields a mean $8.27\times$ speedup over baseline, with larger gains on harder benchmarks: streamcluster exceeds $20\times$ and kmeans reaches approximately $10\times$. Across benchmarks, agents consistently rediscover known hardware optimization patterns without domain-specific training, and the best designs often do not originate from top-ranked ILP candidates, indicating that global optimization exposes improvements missed by sub-kernel search. These results establish agent scaling as a practical and effective axis for HLS optimization.
title_zh: 面向高层次综合的代理工厂：通用编程代理在硬件优化方面能走多远？
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项实证研究，探讨通用编码代理——在未进行硬件特定训练的情况下——如何从高层算法规范中优化硬件设计。我们引入了一个“代理工厂”（agent factory），采用两阶段流程来构建并协调多个自主优化代理。在第一阶段，该流程将设计分解为子核函数，独立地对每个子核使用指令（pragma）和代码级变换进行优化，并构建一个整数线性规划（ILP）模型，以在面积约束下组合出全局有潜力的配置方案。在第二阶段，系统针对最优的ILP解启动$N$个专家代理，每个代理探索跨功能的优化策略，如指令重组、循环融合和内存结构重排等，这些优化手段无法通过子核分解捕捉到。我们在HLS-Eval和Rodinia-HLS中的12个核函数上评估了该方法，使用Claude Code（Opus 4.5/4.6）与AMD Vitis HLS工具链。当代理数量从1个扩展到10个时，平均性能提升达8.27倍，而在更复杂的基准测试中收益更大：streamcluster的加速超过20倍，kmeans达到约10倍。在所有基准测试中，代理均能一致地重新发现已知的硬件优化模式，且最佳设计方案往往并非来自ILP排名最高的候选解，这表明全局优化能够揭示子核搜索所遗漏的改进空间。这些结果确立了代理规模扩展作为HLS优化中一种实用而有效的优化维度。

title: The Kitchen Loop: User-Spec-Driven Development for a Self-Evolving Codebase
authors: Yannick Roy
abstract: Code production is now a commodity; the bottleneck is knowing what to build and proving it works. We present the Kitchen Loop, a framework for autonomous, self-evolving software built on a unified trust model: (1) a specification surface enumerating what the product claims to support; (2) 'As a User x 1000', where an LLM agent exercises that surface as a synthetic power user at 1,000x human cadence; (3) Unbeatable Tests, ground-truth verification the code author cannot fake; and (4) Drift Control, continuous quality measurement with automated pause gates. We validate across two production systems over 285+ iterations, producing 1,094+ merged pull requests with zero regressions detected by the regression oracle (methodology in Section 6.1). We observe emergent properties at scale: multi-iteration self-correction chains, autonomous infrastructure healing, and monotonically improving quality gates. The primitives are not new; our contribution is their composition into a production-tested system with the operational discipline that makes long-running autonomous evolution safe.
title_zh: 厨房循环：由用户需求驱动的自演化代码库开发
abstract_zh: 代码生产如今已成为一种商品；真正的瓶颈在于知道该构建什么以及证明其有效。我们提出了“厨房循环”（Kitchen Loop）框架，这是一种基于统一信任模型的自主、自我演进软件系统，包含四个核心要素：（1）规范表面（specification surface），列出产品声称支持的功能；（2）“作为用户 x 1000”（As a User x 1000），即由大语言模型（LLM）代理以人类千倍的速度扮演合成型高阶用户，全面测试该规范表面；（3）无懈可击的测试（Unbeatable Tests），提供真实可靠的验证机制，使代码作者无法伪造结果；（4）漂移控制（Drift Control），通过持续的质量度量与自动暂停机制，确保系统稳定性。我们在两个生产系统上进行了验证，历经285次以上的迭代，生成了超过1,094个已合并的拉取请求，且回归检测器（regression oracle）未发现任何回归问题（方法论详见第6.1节）。在大规模运行中，我们观察到一些涌现特性：多轮迭代的自我修正链、自主的基础设施修复能力，以及质量门限的单调提升。这些基础组件本身并非全新，我们的贡献在于将它们整合为一个经过生产环境验证的系统，并引入了使长期自主演化安全可控的操作纪律。

title: Experimental Analysis of FreeRTOS Dependability through Targeted Fault Injection Campaigns
authors: Luca Mannella, Stefano Di Carlo, Alessandro Savino
abstract: Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOSes) play a crucial role in safety-critical domains, where deterministic and predictable task execution is essential. Yet they are increasingly exposed to ionizing radiation, which can compromise system dependability. To assess FreeRTOS under such conditions, we introduce KRONOS, a software-based, non-intrusive post-propagation Fault Injection (FI) framework that injects transient and permanent faults into Operating System-visible kernel data structures without specialized hardware or debug interfaces. Using KRONOS, we conduct an extensive FI campaign on core FreeRTOS kernel components, including scheduler-related variables and Task Control Blocks (TCBs), characterizing the impact of kernel-level corruptions on functional correctness, timing behavior, and availability. The results show that corruption of pointer and key scheduler-related variables frequently leads to crashes, whereas many TCB fields have only a limited impact on system availability.
title_zh: 通过定向故障注入实验分析FreeRTOS的可靠性
abstract_zh: 实时操作系统（RTOS）在安全关键领域中扮演着至关重要的角色，因为在这些领域中，任务执行的确定性和可预测性至关重要。然而，随着系统暴露于电离辐射环境中的频率增加，其可靠性正面临日益严峻的挑战。为了评估FreeRTOS在该类条件下的表现，我们提出了KRONOS——一种基于软件、非侵入式的后传播故障注入（FI）框架。该框架无需专用硬件或调试接口，即可向操作系统可见的内核数据结构中注入瞬态和永久性故障。利用KRONOS，我们对FreeRTOS核心内核组件（包括调度器相关变量和任务控制块TCB）展开了大规模的故障注入实验，系统地分析了内核级数据损坏对功能正确性、时序行为以及系统可用性的影响。实验结果表明，指针及关键调度器相关变量的破坏往往导致系统崩溃，而多数TCB字段的损坏对系统可用性的影响相对有限。

title: SHAPR: Operationalising Human-AI Collaborative Research Through Structured Knowledge Generation
authors: Ka Ching Chan
abstract: SHAPR (Solo Human-Centred and AI-Assisted Practice) is a framework for research software development that integrates human-centred decision-making with AI-assisted capabilities. While prior work introduced SHAPR as a conceptual framework, this paper focuses on its operationalisation as a structured, traceable, and knowledge-generating approach to AI-assisted research practice. We present a set of interconnected models describing how research activities are organised through iterative cycles (Explore-Build-Use-Evaluate-Learn), how artefacts evolve through development and use, and how empirical evidence is transformed into conceptual knowledge. Central to this process are Structured Knowledge Units (SKUs), which provide modular and reusable representations of insights derived from practice, supporting knowledge accumulation across cycles. The framework introduces evidence and traceability as a cross-cutting mechanism linking human decisions, AI-assisted development, and artefact evolution to enable transparency, reproducibility, and systematic refinement. SHAPR is also positioned as an AI-executable research framework, as its structured processes and documentation can be interpreted by generative AI systems to guide research workflows. Simultaneously, SHAPR supports a continuum of AI involvement, allowing researchers to balance control, learning, and automation across different contexts. Beyond individual workflows, SHAPR is conceptualised as an integrated research system combining LLM workspaces, development environments, cloud storage, and version control to support scalable, knowledge-centred research practices. Overall, SHAPR provides a practical and theoretically grounded foundation for conducting rigorous, transparent, and reproducible research in AI-assisted environments, contributing to the development of scalable and methodologically sound research practices.
title_zh: SHAPR：通过结构化知识生成实现人机协同研究的运作
abstract_zh: SHAPR（单人以人类为中心并由人工智能辅助的实践）是一种研究软件开发框架，将以人为本的决策机制与人工智能辅助能力相结合。尽管以往的研究已将SHAPR作为概念性框架提出，本文则聚焦于其具体化应用，将其发展为一种结构化、可追溯且能够生成知识的研究实践方法。我们提出了一系列相互关联的模型，描述了研究活动如何通过迭代循环（探索—构建—使用—评估—学习）组织进行，阐述了研究产物在开发与使用过程中的演化路径，以及实证证据如何转化为概念性知识。该过程的核心是结构化知识单元（Structured Knowledge Units, SKUs），它们以模块化和可复用的形式呈现来自实践的洞察，支持跨周期的知识积累。该框架引入证据与可追溯性作为贯穿始终的机制，将人类决策、AI辅助开发及产物演化紧密联系起来，从而实现透明性、可重复性和系统性优化。此外，SHAPR被定位为一种可由人工智能执行的研究框架，其结构化的流程与文档可被生成式AI系统理解并用于指导研究工作流。同时，SHAPR支持人工智能参与程度的连续谱系，使研究者能够在不同情境下灵活平衡控制权、学习深度与自动化水平。超越个体工作流层面，SHAPR被构想为一个集成的研究系统，整合大型语言模型工作空间、开发环境、云存储与版本控制系统，以支持可扩展、以知识为中心的研究实践。总体而言，SHAPR为在人工智能辅助环境中开展严谨、透明且可重复的研究提供了切实可行且理论扎实的基础，推动了可扩展、方法学健全的研究实践的发展。

title: Investigating the Fundamental Limit: A Feasibility Study of Hybrid-Neural Archival
authors: Marcus Armstrong, ZiWei Qiu, Huy Q. Vo, Arjun Mukherjee
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) possess a theoretical capability to model information density far beyond the limits of classical statistical methods (e.g., Lempel-Ziv). However, utilizing this capability for lossless compression involves navigating severe system constraints, including non-deterministic hardware and prohibitive computational costs. In this work, we present an exploratory study into the feasibility of LLM-based archival systems. We introduce \textbf{Hybrid-LLM}, a proof-of-concept architecture designed to investigate the "entropic capacity" of foundation models in a storage context. \textbf{We identify a critical barrier to deployment:} the "GPU Butterfly Effect," where microscopic hardware non-determinism precludes data recovery. We resolve this via a novel logit quantization protocol, enabling the rigorous measurement of neural compression rates on real-world data. Our experiments reveal a distinct divergence between "retrieval-based" density (0.39 BPC on memorized literature) and "predictive" density (0.75 BPC on unseen news). While current inference latency ($\approx 2600\times$ slower than Zstd) limits immediate deployment to ultra-cold storage, our findings demonstrate that LLMs successfully capture semantic redundancy inaccessible to classical algorithms, establishing a baseline for future research into semantic file systems.
title_zh: 探究根本极限：混合神经存档的可行性研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）理论上具备远超经典统计方法（如Lempel-Ziv）的信息密度建模能力。然而，将这一潜力应用于无损压缩时，需面对严重的系统限制，包括硬件的非确定性以及高昂的计算成本。在本研究中，我们开展了一项探索性工作，旨在评估基于LLM的归档系统可行性。我们提出了一个概念验证架构——\textbf{Hybrid-LLM}，用于探究基础模型在存储场景下的“熵容量”。\textbf{我们识别出部署中的关键障碍：}“GPU蝴蝶效应”——微小的硬件非确定性会导致数据无法恢复。为此，我们提出一种新颖的logit量化协议，实现了对真实世界数据上神经压缩率的严格测量。实验结果揭示了显著差异：基于检索的压缩密度为0.39比特/字符（BPC），适用于已记忆的文学文本；而基于预测的压缩密度则达到0.75 BPC，适用于未见过的新闻内容。尽管当前推理延迟（约比Zstd慢2600倍）限制了其在即时场景中的应用，仅适合超冷存储，但我们的研究证实，LLMs能够有效捕捉经典算法无法触及的语义冗余，为未来语义文件系统的研究奠定了重要基准。

title: SEVerA: Verified Synthesis of Self-Evolving Agents
authors: Debangshu Banerjee, Changming Xu, Gagandeep Singh
abstract: Recent advances have shown the effectiveness of self-evolving LLM agents on tasks such as program repair and scientific discovery. In this paradigm, a planner LLM synthesizes an agent program that invokes parametric models, including LLMs, which are then tuned per task to improve performance. However, existing self-evolving agent frameworks provide no formal guarantees of safety or correctness. Because such programs are often executed autonomously on unseen inputs, this lack of guarantees raises reliability and security concerns. We formulate agentic code generation as a constrained learning problem, combining hard formal specifications with soft objectives capturing task utility. We introduce Formally Guarded Generative Models (FGGM), which allow the planner LLM to specify a formal output contract for each generative model call using first-order logic. Each FGGM call wraps the underlying model in a rejection sampler with a verified fallback, ensuring every returned output satisfies the contract for any input and parameter setting. Building on FGGM, we present SEVerA (Self-Evolving Verified Agents), a three-stage framework: Search synthesizes candidate parametric programs containing FGGM calls; Verification proves correctness with respect to hard constraints for all parameter values, reducing the problem to unconstrained learning; and Learning applies scalable gradient-based optimization, including GRPO-style fine-tuning, to improve the soft objective while preserving correctness. We evaluate SEVerA on Dafny program verification, symbolic math synthesis, and policy-compliant agentic tool use ($τ^2$-bench). Across tasks, SEVerA achieves zero constraint violations while improving performance over unconstrained and SOTA baselines, showing that formal behavioral constraints not only guarantee correctness but also steer synthesis toward higher-quality agents.
title_zh: SEVerA：自演化智能体的验证合成
abstract_zh:
近期进展表明，自演化的大语言模型（LLM）代理在程序修复和科学发现等任务中具有显著有效性。在此范式中，规划型 LLM 会生成一个代理程序，该程序调用参数化模型（包括 LLM），并针对具体任务对这些模型进行微调以提升性能。然而，现有的自演化代理框架并未提供任何关于安全或正确性的形式化保证。由于这类程序通常在未见过的输入上自主执行，缺乏此类保证引发了可靠性与安全性方面的担忧。

我们提出将智能体代码生成建模为一个带约束的学习问题，结合硬性形式规范与捕捉任务效用的软目标。为此，我们引入了**形式化防护生成模型**（Formally Guarded Generative Models, FGGM），允许规划型 LLM 使用一阶逻辑为每次生成模型调用指定一个形式化的输出契约。每个 FGGM 调用都会在底层模型外包裹一个经过验证的拒绝采样器及回退机制，从而确保无论输入或参数如何设置，返回的输出始终满足契约要求。

基于 FGGM，我们提出了 SEVerA（Self-Evolving Verified Agents）——一种三阶段框架：  
- **搜索**（Search）阶段生成包含 FGGM 调用的候选参数化程序；  
- **验证**（Verification）阶段针对所有参数取值证明其符合硬性约束，从而将问题转化为无约束学习；  
- **学习**（Learning）阶段采用可扩展的基于梯度的优化方法（包括类似 GRPO 的微调策略），在保持正确性的前提下优化软目标。

我们在 Dafny 程序验证、符号数学合成以及符合策略的智能体工具使用（$τ^2$-bench）任务上评估了 SEVerA。在各项任务中，SEVerA 均实现了零约束违规，同时性能优于无约束基线和当前最优（SOTA）方法。结果表明，形式化的行为约束不仅能够保证正确性，还能引导生成过程向更高品质的智能体演进。

title: Error Understanding in Program Code With LLM-DL for Multi-label Classification
authors: Md Faizul Ibne Amin, Yutaka Watanobe, Md. Mostafizer Rahman, Daniel M. Muepu, Md. Shahajada Mia
abstract: Programming is a core skill in computer science and software engineering (SE), yet identifying and resolving code errors remains challenging for both novice and experienced developers. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in natural language understanding and generation tasks, their potential in domain-specific, complex scenarios, such as multi-label classification (MLC) of programming errors, remains underexplored. Recognizing this less-explored area, this study proposes a multi-label error classification (MLEC) framework for source code that leverages fine-tuned LLMs, including CodeT5-base, GraphCodeBERT, CodeT5+, UniXcoder, RoBERTa, PLBART, and CoTexT. These LLMs are integrated with deep learning (DL) architectures such as GRU, LSTM, BiLSTM, and BiLSTM with an additive attention mechanism (BiLSTM-A) to capture both syntactic and semantic features from a real-world student-written Python code error dataset. Extensive experiments across 32 model variants, optimized using Optuna-based hyperparameter tuning, have been evaluated using comprehensive multi-label metrics, including average accuracy, macro and weighted precision, recall, F1-score, exact match accuracy, One-error, Hamming loss, Jaccard similarity, and ROC-AUC (micro, macro, and weighted). Results show that the CodeT5+\_GRU model achieved the strongest performance, with a weighted F1-score of 0.8243, average accuracy of 91.84\%, exact match accuracy of 53.78\%, Hamming loss of 0.0816, and One error of 0.0708. These findings confirm the effectiveness of combining pretrained semantic encoders with efficient recurrent decoders. This work lays the foundation for developing intelligent, scalable tools for automated code feedback, with potential applications in programming education (PE) and broader SE domains.
title_zh: 使用LLM-DL进行多标签分类时的程序代码错误理解
abstract_zh: 编程是计算机科学和软件工程（SE）的核心技能，然而对于新手和经验丰富的开发者而言，识别和修复代码错误始终是一项挑战。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在自然语言理解与生成任务中展现出卓越能力，但其在特定领域、复杂场景中的应用潜力——如编程错误的多标签分类（MLC）——仍鲜有探索。针对这一尚未充分研究的方向，本研究提出了一种基于微调大语言模型的源代码多标签错误分类（MLEC）框架，所采用的模型包括 CodeT5-base、GraphCodeBERT、CodeT5+、UniXcoder、RoBERTa、PLBART 和 CoTexT。这些预训练语言模型与深度学习架构（如 GRU、LSTM、BiLSTM 以及带有加性注意力机制的 BiLSTM-A）相结合，旨在从真实学生编写的 Python 代码错误数据集中捕捉代码的语法与语义特征。通过 Optuna 进行超参数优化，对 32 种模型变体进行了全面实验，并采用多种多标签评估指标进行分析，涵盖平均准确率、宏平均与加权平均的精确率、召回率、F1 分数、精确匹配准确率、One-error、Hamming 损失、Jaccard 相似度，以及 ROC-AUC（微平均、宏平均和加权平均）。实验结果表明，CodeT5+\_GRU 模型表现最佳，其加权 F1 分数达到 0.8243，平均准确率为 91.84%，精确匹配准确率为 53.78%，Hamming 损失为 0.0816，One-error 为 0.0708。这些结果验证了将预训练语义编码器与高效循环解码器结合的有效性。本研究为开发智能、可扩展的自动化代码反馈工具奠定了基础，具有在编程教育（PE）及更广泛的软件工程领域中的应用前景。

title: MobileDev-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Language Models on Mobile Application Development
authors: Moshood A. Fakorede, Krishna Upadhyay, A. B. Siddique, Umar Farooq
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on automated software engineering tasks, yet existing benchmarks focus primarily on general-purpose libraries or web applications, leaving mobile application development largely unexplored despite its strict platform constraints, framework-driven lifecycles, and complex platform API interactions. We introduce MobileDev-Bench, a benchmark comprising 384 real-world issue-resolution tasks collected from 18 production mobile applications spanning Android Native (Java/Kotlin), React Native (TypeScript), and Flutter (Dart). Each task pairs an authentic developer-reported issue with executable test patches, enabling fully automated validation of model-generated fixes within mobile build environments. The benchmark exhibits substantial patch complexity: fixes modify 12.5 files and 324.9 lines on average, and 35.7% of instances require coordinated changes across multiple artifact types, such as source and manifest files. Evaluation of four state-of-the-art code-capable LLMs, GPT- 5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini Flash 2.5, and Qwen3-Coder, yields low end-to-end resolution rates of 3.39%-5.21%, revealing significant performance gaps compared to prior benchmarks. Further analysis reveals systematic failure modes, with fault localization across multi-file and multi-artifact changes emerging as the primary bottleneck.
title_zh: MobileDev-Bench：面向移动应用开发的语言模型综合评估基准
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化软件工程任务中表现出色，但现有基准测试主要聚焦于通用库或Web应用，而对移动应用开发领域关注不足。尽管移动开发面临严格的平台限制、框架驱动的生命周期以及复杂的平台API交互，该领域仍缺乏系统性研究。为此，我们提出了MobileDev-Bench，一个涵盖384个真实世界问题修复任务的基准数据集，这些任务源自18个生产环境中的移动应用，覆盖Android原生（Java/Kotlin）、React Native（TypeScript）和Flutter（Dart）三大技术栈。每个任务均包含开发者报告的真实问题及其可执行的测试补丁，支持在移动构建环境中对模型生成的修复方案进行全自动验证。该基准展现出较高的补丁复杂度：平均每个修复涉及12.5个文件和324.9行代码变更，且35.7%的任务需要跨多种类型构件（如源码文件与清单文件）的协同修改。对四种前沿代码能力LLM（GPT-5.2、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini Flash 2.5、Qwen3-Coder）的评估显示，端到端问题解决率仅为3.39%–5.21%，显著低于以往基准的表现，暴露出巨大性能差距。进一步分析揭示了系统性的失败模式，其中在多文件、多构件变更场景下的故障定位成为主要瓶颈。

title: An Approach to Generate Attack Graphs with a Case Study on Siemens PCS7 Blueprint for Water Treatment Plants
authors: Lucas Miranda, Carlos Banjar, Daniel Menasche, Anton Kocheturov, Gaurav Srivastava, Tobias Limmer
abstract: Assessing the security posture of Industrial Control Systems (ICS) is critical for protecting essential infrastructure. However, the complexity and scale of these environments make it challenging to identify and prioritize potential attack paths. This paper introduces a semi-automated approach for generating attack graphs in ICS environments to visualize and analyze multi-step attack scenarios. Our methodology integrates network topology information with vulnerability data to construct a model of the system. This model is then processed by a stateful traversal algorithm to identify potential exploit chains based on preconditions and consequences. We present a case study applying the proposed framework to the Siemens PCS7 Cybersecurity Blueprint for Water Treatment Plants. The results demonstrate the framework's ability to simulate different attack scenarios, including those originating from known CVEs and potential device misconfigurations. We show how a single point of failure can compromise network segmentation and how patching a critical vulnerability can protect an entire security zone, providing actionable insights for risk mitigation.
title_zh: 一种生成攻击图的方法——以西门子PCS7水处理厂蓝图为例的案例研究
abstract_zh: 评估工业控制系统（ICS）的安全状况对于保护关键基础设施至关重要。然而，这些环境的复杂性和规模使得识别并优先处理潜在攻击路径变得极具挑战性。本文提出了一种半自动化的攻击图生成方法，用于在ICS环境中可视化和分析多步骤攻击场景。我们的方法将网络拓扑信息与漏洞数据相结合，构建系统模型，并通过一种有状态的遍历算法，基于前提条件和后果识别潜在的利用链。我们以西门子PCS7水处理厂网络安全蓝图为例，展示了该框架的实际应用。结果表明，该框架能够模拟多种攻击场景，包括源自已知CVE漏洞以及潜在设备配置错误的情况。研究还揭示了单点故障如何破坏网络分段防护，以及修补关键漏洞如何保护整个安全区域，为风险缓解提供了可操作的洞察。

title: LLM-Driven Reasoning for Constraint-Aware Feature Selection in Industrial Systems
authors: Yuhang Zhou, Zhuokai Zhao, Ke Li, Spilios Evmorfos, Gökalp Demirci, Mingyi Wang, Qiao Liu, Qifei Wang, Serena Li, Weiwei Li, Tingting Wang, Mingze Gao, Gedi Zhou, Abhishek Kumar, Xiangjun Fan, Lizhu Zhang, Jiayi Liu
abstract: Feature selection is a crucial step in large-scale industrial machine learning systems, directly affecting model accuracy, efficiency, and maintainability. Traditional feature selection methods rely on labeled data and statistical heuristics, making them difficult to apply in production environments where labeled data are limited and multiple operational constraints must be satisfied. To address this, we propose Model Feature Agent (MoFA), a model-driven framework that performs sequential, reasoning-based feature selection using both semantic and quantitative feature information. MoFA incorporates feature definitions, importance scores, correlations, and metadata (e.g., feature groups or types) into structured prompts and selects features through interpretable, constraint-aware reasoning. We evaluate MoFA in three real-world industrial applications: (1) True Interest and Time-Worthiness Prediction, where it improves accuracy while reducing feature group complexity, (2) Value Model Enhancement, where it discovers high-order interaction terms that yield substantial engagement gains in online experiments, and (3) Notification Behavior Prediction, where it selects compact, high-value feature subsets that improve both model accuracy and inference efficiency. Together, these results demonstrate the practicality and effectiveness of LLM-based reasoning for feature selection in real production systems.
title_zh: 基于大模型驱动的工业系统中约束感知特征选择推理
abstract_zh: 特征选择是大规模工业机器学习系统中的关键步骤，直接影响模型的准确性、效率和可维护性。传统的特征选择方法依赖于标注数据和统计启发式规则，在生产环境中应用困难，因为标注数据有限，且需满足多种运行约束。为解决这一问题，我们提出了模型驱动的特征选择框架——模型特征代理（MoFA），该框架利用语义与量化特征信息，进行基于推理的序列化特征选择。MoFA将特征定义、重要性评分、相关性以及元数据（如特征组或类型）整合到结构化提示中，并通过可解释、约束感知的推理过程选择特征。我们在三个真实的工业应用场景中评估了MoFA的表现：（1）真实兴趣与时间价值预测，MoFA在提升准确率的同时降低了特征组的复杂度；（2）价值模型增强，MoFA发现了高阶交互项，在线上实验中带来了显著的用户参与度提升；（3）通知行为预测，MoFA选取了紧凑且高价值的特征子集，同时提升了模型准确率和推理效率。这些结果共同证明了基于大语言模型的推理在真实生产系统中进行特征选择的实用性和有效性。

title: Prompt Attack Detection with LLM-as-a-Judge and Mixture-of-Models
authors: Hieu Xuan Le, Benjamin Goh, Quy Anh Tang
abstract: Prompt attacks, including jailbreaks and prompt injections, pose a critical security risk to Large Language Model (LLM) systems. In production, guardrails must mitigate these attacks under strict low-latency constraints, resulting in a deployment gap in which lightweight classifiers and rule-based systems struggle to generalize under distribution shift, while high-capacity LLM-based judges remain too slow or costly for live enforcement. In this work, we examine whether lightweight, general-purpose LLMs can reliably serve as security judges under real-world production constraints. Through careful prompt and output design, lightweight LLMs are guided through a structured reasoning process involving explicit intent decomposition, safety-signal verification, harm assessment, and self-reflection. We evaluate our method on a curated dataset combining benign queries from real-world chatbots with adversarial prompts generated via automated red teaming (ART), covering diverse and evolving patterns. Our results show that general-purpose LLMs, such as gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001, can serve as effective low-latency judges for live guardrails. This configuration is currently deployed in production as a centralized guardrail service for public service chatbots in Singapore. We additionally evaluate a Mixture-of-Models (MoM) setting to assess whether aggregating multiple LLM judges improves prompt-attack detection performance relative to single-model judges, with only modest gains observed.
title_zh: 基于大模型判官与混合模型的提示攻击检测
abstract_zh: 提示攻击（包括越狱和提示注入）对大型语言模型（LLM）系统构成了严重的安全威胁。在实际生产环境中，防护机制必须在严格的低延迟约束下缓解这些攻击，从而导致部署上的差距：轻量级分类器和基于规则的系统在面对分布偏移时难以泛化，而高容量的基于LLM的判断模型又因速度过慢或成本过高，无法用于实时防护。本文探讨了轻量级通用LLM是否能在真实生产环境的约束下可靠地充当安全判断者。通过精心设计的提示与输出结构，我们引导轻量级LLM经历一个包含显式意图分解、安全信号验证、危害评估及自我反思的结构化推理过程。我们在一个精心构建的数据集上评估该方法，该数据集结合了来自真实聊天机器人的良性查询以及通过自动化红队测试（ART）生成的对抗性提示，覆盖了多样且不断演化的攻击模式。实验结果表明，通用型LLM（如gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001）能够作为低延迟的实时防护判断工具，表现出色。目前，这一配置已在新加坡公共政务服务聊天机器人中作为集中式防护服务投入生产使用。此外，我们还评估了多模型集成（MoM）设置，以检验聚合多个LLM判断者是否能提升对提示攻击的检测性能，结果显示相较于单模型判断，性能提升有限。

title: Beyond Content Safety: Real-Time Monitoring for Reasoning Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models
authors: Xunguang Wang, Yuguang Zhou, Qingyue Wang, Zongjie Li, Ruixuan Huang, Zhenlan Ji, Pingchuan Ma, Shuai Wang
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to solve complex tasks, yet the safety of the reasoning process itself remains largely unaddressed. Existing work on LLM safety focuses on content safety--detecting harmful, biased, or factually incorrect outputs -- and treats the reasoning chain as an opaque intermediate artifact. We identify reasoning safety as an orthogonal and equally critical security dimension: the requirement that a model's reasoning trajectory be logically consistent, computationally efficient, and resistant to adversarial manipulation. We make three contributions. First, we formally define reasoning safety and introduce a nine-category taxonomy of unsafe reasoning behaviors, covering input parsing errors, reasoning execution errors, and process management errors. Second, we conduct a large-scale prevalence study annotating 4111 reasoning chains from both natural reasoning benchmarks and four adversarial attack methods (reasoning hijacking and denial-of-service), confirming that all nine error types occur in practice and that each attack induces a mechanistically interpretable signature. Third, we propose a Reasoning Safety Monitor: an external LLM-based component that runs in parallel with the target model, inspects each reasoning step in real time via a taxonomy-embedded prompt, and dispatches an interrupt signal upon detecting unsafe behavior. Evaluation on a 450-chain static benchmark shows that our monitor achieves up to 84.88\% step-level localization accuracy and 85.37\% error-type classification accuracy, outperforming hallucination detectors and process reward model baselines by substantial margins. These results demonstrate that reasoning-level monitoring is both necessary and practically achievable, and establish reasoning safety as a foundational concern for the secure deployment of large reasoning models.
title_zh: 超越内容安全：大型语言模型推理漏洞的实时监控
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地依赖显式的思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）推理来解决复杂任务，然而推理过程本身的安全性却长期未得到充分关注。现有的LLM安全研究主要聚焦于内容安全——即检测有害、偏见或事实错误的输出——并将推理链视为一个不透明的中间产物。我们提出，推理安全是一个独立且同样关键的安全维度：要求模型的推理轨迹在逻辑上保持一致、计算上高效，并能抵御对抗性操纵。本文做出三项贡献。第一，我们正式定义了推理安全，并提出一个涵盖九类不安全推理行为的分类体系，包括输入解析错误、推理执行错误以及过程管理错误。第二，我们开展了一项大规模的普遍性研究，对来自自然推理基准数据集及四种对抗攻击方法（推理劫持与拒绝服务攻击）的4111条推理链进行了标注，证实所有九类错误在实际中均存在，且每种攻击均引发可机制化解释的特征模式。第三，我们提出一种“推理安全监控器”（Reasoning Safety Monitor）：一个与目标模型并行运行的基于大语言模型的外部组件，通过嵌入分类体系的提示（prompt）实时检查每一步推理，一旦检测到不安全行为便发出中断信号。在包含450条推理链的静态基准测试中，我们的监控器在步骤级定位准确率最高达到84.88%，错误类型分类准确率达85.37%，显著优于幻觉检测器和过程奖励模型基线。这些结果表明，推理层面的监控不仅必要，而且切实可行，从而确立了推理安全作为大型推理模型安全部署中的基础性关切。

title: ALPS: Automated Least-Privilege Enforcement for Securing Serverless Functions
authors: Changhee Shin, Bom Kim, Seungsoo Lee
abstract: Serverless computing is increasingly adopted for AI-driven workloads due to its automatic scaling and pay-as-you-go model. However, its function-based architecture creates significant security risks, including excessive privilege allocation and poor permission management. In this paper, we present ALPS, an automated framework for enforcing least privilege in serverless environments. Our system employs serverless-tailored static analysis to extract precise permission requirements from function code and a fine-tuned Large Language Model (LLM) to generate language- and vendor-specific security policies. It also performs real-time monitoring to block unauthorized access and adapt to policy or code changes, supporting heterogeneous cloud providers and programming languages. In an evaluation of 8,322 real-world functions across AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure, ALPS achieved 94.8\% coverage for least-privilege extraction, improved security logic generation quality by 220\% (BLEU), 124\% (ChrF++) and 100\% (ROUGE-2), and added minimum performance overhead. These results demonstrate that ALPS provides an effective, practical, and vendor-agnostic solution for securing serverless workloads.
title_zh: ALPS：用于保护无服务器函数的自动化最小权限强制机制
abstract_zh: 无服务器计算因其自动扩展和按使用量付费的模式，正被越来越多地用于人工智能驱动的工作负载。然而，其基于函数的架构也带来了显著的安全风险，包括权限过度分配和权限管理不善等问题。本文提出ALPS，一个用于在无服务器环境中强制执行最小权限原则的自动化框架。我们的系统采用专为无服务器环境设计的静态分析技术，从函数代码中精确提取出权限需求，并利用经过微调的大语言模型（LLM）生成与编程语言和云服务提供商特定的安全部署策略。此外，系统还具备实时监控能力，可阻止未经授权的访问，并能根据策略或代码变更动态调整，支持多种异构云平台和编程语言。在对AWS、Google Cloud和Azure上共8,322个真实世界函数的评估中，ALPS实现了94.8%的最小权限提取覆盖率，安全逻辑生成质量提升220%（BLEU）、124%（ChrF++）和100%（ROUGE-2），同时引入了极小的性能开销。实验结果表明，ALPS为保护无服务器工作负载提供了一种有效、实用且厂商无关的解决方案。

title: Self-Improvement of Large Language Models: A Technical Overview and Future Outlook
authors: Haoyan Yang, Mario Xerri, Solha Park, Huajian Zhang, Yiyang Feng, Sai Akhil Kogilathota, Jiawei Zhou
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) continue to advance, improving them solely through human supervision is becoming increasingly costly and limited in scalability. As models approach human-level capabilities in certain domains, human feedback may no longer provide sufficiently informative signals for further improvement. At the same time, the growing ability of models to make autonomous decisions and execute complex actions naturally enables abstractions in which components of the model development process can be progressively automated. Together, these challenges and opportunities have driven increasing interest in self-improvement, where models autonomously generate data, evaluate outputs, and iteratively refine their own capabilities. In this paper, we present a system-level perspective on self-improving language models and introduce a unified framework that organizes existing techniques. We conceptualize the self-improvement system as a closed-loop lifecycle, consisting of four tightly coupled processes: data acquisition, data selection, model optimization, and inference refinement, along with an autonomous evaluation layer. Within this framework, the model itself plays a central role in driving each stage: collecting or generating data, selecting informative signals, updating its parameters, and refining outputs, while the autonomous evaluation layer continuously monitors progress and guides the improvement cycle across stages. Following this lifecycle perspective, we systematically review and analyze representative methods for each component from a technical standpoint. We further discuss current limitations and outline our vision for future research toward fully self-improving LLMs.
title_zh: 大型语言模型的自我提升：技术综述与未来展望
abstract_zh:
随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的持续发展，仅依靠人工监督来提升模型性能正变得越来越昂贵，且在可扩展性方面面临局限。当模型在某些领域接近人类水平能力时，人类反馈所提供的信息量已不足以支持进一步优化。与此同时，模型自主决策和执行复杂任务能力的不断增强，自然催生了对模型开发过程各环节逐步自动化的抽象构想。这些挑战与机遇共同推动了自提升（self-improvement）研究的兴起——即模型能够自主生成数据、评估输出，并迭代地改进自身能力。

本文从系统层面探讨自提升语言模型，并提出一个统一框架，以整合现有技术。我们将自提升系统视为一个闭环生命周期，包含四个紧密耦合的核心环节：数据获取、数据选择、模型优化和推理精炼，同时配备一个自主评估层。在此框架中，模型本身在每个阶段均发挥核心作用：主动收集或生成数据、筛选具有信息量的信号、更新自身参数、优化输出结果；而自主评估层则持续监控进展，并在各阶段间引导改进循环。

基于这一生命周期视角，我们系统性地从技术角度回顾并分析了各组件的代表性方法。此外，我们还讨论了当前存在的局限性，并展望未来研究方向，致力于实现真正意义上的完全自提升大型语言模型。

title: To Write or to Automate Linguistic Prompts, That Is the Question
authors: Marina Sánchez-Torrón, Daria Akselrod, Jason Rauchwerk
abstract: LLM performance is highly sensitive to prompt design, yet whether automatic prompt optimization can replace expert prompt engineering in linguistic tasks remains unexplored. We present the first systematic comparison of hand-crafted zero-shot expert prompts, base DSPy signatures, and GEPA-optimized DSPy signatures across translation, terminology insertion, and language quality assessment, evaluating five model configurations. Results are task-dependent. In terminology insertion, optimized and manual prompts produce mostly statistically indistinguishable quality. In translation, each approach wins on different models. In LQA, expert prompts achieve stronger error detection while optimization improves characterization. Across all tasks, GEPA elevates minimal DSPy signatures, and the majority of expert-optimized comparisons show no statistically significant difference. We note that the comparison is asymmetric: GEPA optimization searches programmatically over gold-standard splits, whereas expert prompts require in principle no labeled data, relying instead on domain expertise and iterative refinement.
title_zh: 是写作还是自动化语言提示，这才是问题
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的性能对提示设计极为敏感，然而自动提示优化是否能在语言任务中取代专家提示工程，目前仍缺乏系统研究。本文首次对人工设计的零样本专家提示、基础DSPy签名以及GEPA优化后的DSPy签名进行了系统性比较，涵盖翻译、术语插入和语言质量评估三项任务，并评估了五种不同的模型配置。结果具有任务依赖性：在术语插入任务中，优化后的提示与人工提示产生的效果在统计上基本无差异；在翻译任务中，不同方法在不同模型上表现更优；在语言质量评估（LQA）任务中，专家提示在错误检测方面表现更强，而优化方法则在错误特征刻画方面更具优势。总体而言，GEPA能够显著提升最小化DSPy签名的表现，且多数专家优化与自动优化之间的对比未显示出统计学上的显著差异。值得注意的是，该比较存在不对称性：GEPA优化是在标准黄金数据集上进行程序化搜索，而专家提示原则上无需标注数据，主要依赖领域知识和迭代优化。

title: Cross-Model Disagreement as a Label-Free Correctness Signal
authors: Matt Gorbett, Suman Jana
abstract: Detecting when a language model is wrong without ground truth labels is a fundamental challenge for safe deployment. Existing approaches rely on a model's own uncertainty -- such as token entropy or confidence scores -- but these signals fail critically on the most dangerous failure mode: confident errors, where a model is wrong but certain. In this work we introduce cross-model disagreement as a correctness indicator -- a simple, training-free signal that can be dropped into existing production systems, routing pipelines, and deployment monitoring infrastructure without modification. Given a model's generated answer, cross-model disagreement computes how surprised or uncertain a second verifier model is when reading that answer via a single forward pass. No generation from the verifying model is required, and no correctness labels are needed. We instantiate this principle as Cross-Model Perplexity (CMP), which measures the verifying model's surprise at the generating model's answer tokens, and Cross-Model Entropy (CME), which measures the verifying model's uncertainty at those positions. Both CMP and CME outperform within-model uncertainty baselines across benchmarks spanning reasoning, retrieval, and mathematical problem solving (MMLU, TriviaQA, and GSM8K). On MMLU, CMP achieves a mean AUROC of 0.75 against a within-model entropy baseline of 0.59. These results establish cross-model disagreement as a practical, training-free approach to label-free correctness estimation, with direct applications in deployment monitoring, model routing, selective prediction, data filtering, and scalable oversight of production language model systems.
title_zh: 跨模型分歧作为无标签正确性信号
abstract_zh: 在没有真实标签的情况下检测语言模型的错误，是实现安全部署的一个基本挑战。现有的方法依赖于模型自身的不确定性信号——如词元熵或置信度分数——但这些信号在最危险的错误类型中会失效：即“自信错误”——模型虽然出错，却表现得非常确定。在本研究中，我们提出以“跨模型不一致”作为正确性判断的指标——一种简单、无需训练的信号，可直接嵌入现有生产系统、路由管道和部署监控基础设施中，无需任何修改。给定一个模型生成的答案，跨模型不一致通过一次前向传播计算第二个验证模型在阅读该答案时的惊讶程度或不确定性。验证模型无需生成任何内容，也无需正确性标签。我们基于这一原则提出了“跨模型困惑度”（Cross-Model Perplexity, CMP），用于衡量验证模型对生成模型输出词元的意外程度；以及“跨模型熵”（Cross-Model Entropy, CME），用于衡量验证模型在这些位置上的不确定性。在涵盖推理、检索和数学问题求解（MMLU、TriviaQA 和 GSM8K）的多个基准测试中，CMP 和 CME 均显著优于基于模型内部不确定性的基线方法。在 MMLU 上，CMP 的平均 AUROC 达到 0.75，远超模型内熵基线的 0.59。这些结果确立了跨模型不一致作为一种实用且无需训练的无标签正确性估计方法，可直接应用于部署监控、模型路由、选择性预测、数据过滤，以及大规模生产级语言模型系统的可扩展监督。

title: Multi-target Coverage-based Greybox Fuzzing
authors: Masami Ichikawa
abstract: In recent years, fuzzing has been widely applied not only to application software but also to system software, including the Linux kernel and firmware, and has become a powerful technique for vulnerability discovery. Among these approaches, Coverage-based grey-box fuzzing, which utilizes runtime code coverage information, has become the dominant methodology. Conventional fuzzing techniques primarily target a single software component and have paid little attention to cooperative execution with other software. However, modern system software architectures commonly consist of firmware and an operating system that operate cooperatively through well-defined interfaces, such as OpenSBI in the RISC-V architecture and OP-TEE in the ARM architecture. In this study, we investigate fuzzing techniques for architectures in which an operating system and firmware operate cooperatively. In particular, we propose a fuzzing method that enables deeper exploration of the system by leveraging the code coverage of each cooperating software component as feedback, compared to conventional Single-target fuzzing. To observe the execution of the operating system and firmware in a unified manner, our method adopts QEMU as a virtualization environment and executes fuzzing by booting the system within a virtual machine. This enables the measurement of code coverage across software boundaries. Furthermore, we implemented the proposed method as a Multi-target Coverage-based Greybox Fuzzer called MTCFuzz and evaluated its effectiveness.
title_zh: 多目标覆盖驱动的灰盒模糊测试
abstract_zh: 近年来，模糊测试（fuzzing）不仅广泛应用于应用软件，还被拓展至系统软件领域，包括Linux内核和固件等，已成为发现漏洞的强大技术。在诸多方法中，基于覆盖率的灰盒模糊测试（Coverage-based grey-box fuzzing）因其利用运行时代码覆盖率信息，已成为主流方法。传统模糊测试技术主要针对单一软件组件，较少关注与其他软件的协同执行。然而，现代系统软件架构通常由固件与操作系统通过明确定义的接口协同工作，例如RISC-V架构中的OpenSBI以及ARM架构中的OP-TEE。本文研究了在操作系统与固件协同工作的架构下所适用的模糊测试技术。特别地，我们提出了一种新的模糊测试方法，通过将各协同软件组件的代码覆盖率作为反馈信息，实现对系统的更深入探索，相较于传统的单目标模糊测试具有显著优势。为统一观察操作系统与固件的执行情况，我们的方法采用QEMU作为虚拟化环境，在虚拟机中启动系统并执行模糊测试，从而能够跨软件边界测量代码覆盖率。此外，我们实现了该方法，开发出名为MTCFuzz的多目标基于覆盖率的灰盒模糊测试工具，并对其有效性进行了评估。

title: WebTestBench: Evaluating Computer-Use Agents towards End-to-End Automated Web Testing
authors: Fanheng Kong, Jingyuan Zhang, Yang Yue, Chenxi Sun, Yang Tian, Shi Feng, Xiaocui Yang, Daling Wang, Yu Tian, Jun Du, Wenchong Zeng, Han Li, Kun Gai
abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has catalyzed a paradigm shift in programming, giving rise to "vibe coding", where users can build complete projects and even control computers using natural language instructions. This paradigm has driven automated webpage development, but it introduces a new requirement about how to automatically verify whether the web functionalities are reliably implemented. Existing works struggle to adapt, relying on static visual similarity or predefined checklists that constrain their utility in open-ended environments. Furthermore, they overlook a vital aspect of software quality, namely latent logical constraints. To address these gaps, we introduce WebTestBench, a benchmark for evaluating end-to-end automated web testing. WebTestBench encompasses comprehensive dimensions across diverse web application categories. We decompose the testing process into two cascaded sub-tasks, checklist generation and defect detection, and propose WebTester, a baseline framework for this task. Evaluating popular LLMs with WebTester reveals severe challenges, including insufficient test completeness, detection bottlenecks, and long-horizon interaction unreliability. These findings expose a substantial gap between current computer-use agent capabilities and industrial-grade deployment demands. We hope that WebTestBench provides valuable insights and guidance for advancing end-to-end automated web testing. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/friedrichor/WebTestBench.
title_zh: WebTestBench：评估计算机使用代理在端到端自动化网页测试中的表现
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现推动了编程范式的变革，催生了“直觉编程”（vibe coding）这一新方式——用户仅通过自然语言指令即可构建完整项目，甚至操控计算机。这一范式促进了自动化网页开发的发展，但也带来了新的挑战：如何自动验证网页功能是否可靠实现。现有方法难以适应这一需求，主要依赖静态视觉相似性或预设检查清单，限制了其在开放环境中的应用。此外，这些方法忽视了软件质量中一个至关重要的方面——潜在的逻辑约束。为填补上述空白，我们提出了 WebTestBench，这是一个用于评估端到端自动化网页测试的基准测试平台。WebTestBench 涵盖了多种网页应用类别，并从多个维度进行全面评测。我们将测试过程分解为两个级联子任务：检查清单生成与缺陷检测，并提出了 WebTester 作为该任务的基线框架。通过对主流 LLMs 使用 WebTester 进行评估，我们发现存在严重问题，包括测试覆盖不充分、缺陷检测瓶颈以及长时交互的不可靠性。这些发现揭示了当前计算机使用智能体的能力与工业级部署要求之间存在显著差距。我们希望 WebTestBench 能为推进端到端自动化网页测试提供有价值的洞见与指导。我们的数据集和代码已开源，地址为 https://github.com/friedrichor/WebTestBench。

title: TopoPilot: Reliable Conversational Workflow Automation for Topological Data Analysis and Visualization
authors: Nathaniel Gorski, Shusen Liu, Bei Wang
abstract: Recent agentic systems demonstrate that large language models can generate scientific visualizations from natural language. However, reliability remains a major limitation: systems may execute invalid operations, introduce subtle but consequential errors, or fail to request missing information when inputs are underspecified. These issues are amplified in real-world workflows, which often exceed the complexity of standard benchmarks. Ensuring reliability in autonomous visualization pipelines therefore remains an open challenge. We present TopoPilot, a reliable and extensible agentic framework for automating complex scientific visualization workflows. TopoPilot incorporates systematic guardrails and verification mechanisms to ensure reliable operation. While we focus on topological data analysis and visualization as a primary use case, the framework is designed to generalize across visualization domains. TopoPilot adopts a reliability-centered two-agent architecture. An orchestrator agent translates user prompts into workflows composed of atomic backend actions, while a verifier agent evaluates these workflows prior to execution, enforcing structural validity and semantic consistency. This separation of interpretation and verification reduces code-generation errors and enforces correctness guarantees. A modular architecture further improves robustness by isolating components and enabling seamless integration of new descriptors and domain-specific workflows without modifying the core system. To systematically address reliability, we introduce a taxonomy of failure modes and implement targeted safeguards for each class. In evaluations simulating 1,000 multi-turn conversations across 100 prompts, including adversarial and infeasible requests, TopoPilot achieves a success rate exceeding 99%, compared to under 50% for baselines without comprehensive guardrails and checks.
title_zh: TopoPilot：用于拓扑数据分析与可视化的可靠对话式工作流自动化
abstract_zh:
近期的智能体系统表明，大型语言模型能够从自然语言生成科学可视化内容。然而，可靠性仍是主要瓶颈：系统可能执行无效操作、引入细微但具有重大影响的错误，或在输入信息不完整时未能主动请求缺失信息。这些问题在真实工作流中尤为突出，因为实际场景往往远超标准基准测试的复杂程度。因此，确保自主可视化流程的可靠性仍是一个未解决的挑战。

我们提出TopoPilot，一种可靠且可扩展的智能体框架，用于自动化复杂的科学可视化工作流。TopoPilot通过系统化的防护机制和验证手段，保障运行的可靠性。尽管我们以拓扑数据分析与可视化为主要应用场景，该框架的设计具备跨可视化领域的泛化能力。

TopoPilot采用以可靠性为核心的双智能体架构：协调器智能体负责将用户指令转化为由原子后端操作组成的流程；验证器智能体则在执行前对这些流程进行评估，确保其结构有效性与语义一致性。这种“解释”与“验证”分离的设计，有效减少了代码生成错误，并提供了严格的正确性保障。

此外，模块化架构进一步提升了系统的鲁棒性：各组件被隔离处理，支持无缝集成新的描述符和领域特定的工作流，而无需修改核心系统。为系统性地应对可靠性问题，我们提出了一个故障模式分类体系，并针对每一类故障类型实施了相应的防护措施。

在模拟100个提示、共1000轮多轮对话的评估中，包括对抗性请求和不可行任务，TopoPilot的成功率超过99%；相比之下，缺乏全面防护机制的基线系统成功率不足50%。

title: Evaluating adaptive and generative AI-based feedback and recommendations in a knowledge-graph-integrated programming learning system
authors: Lalita Na Nongkhai, Jingyun Wang, Adam Wynn, Takahiko Mendori
abstract: This paper introduces the design and development of a framework that integrates a large language model (LLM) with a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) approach leveraging both a knowledge graph and user interaction history. The framework is incorporated into a previously developed adaptive learning support system to assess learners' code, generate formative feedback, and recommend exercises. Moerover, this study examines learner preferences across three instructional modes; adaptive, Generative AI (GenAI), and hybrid GenAI-adaptive. An experimental study was conducted to compare the learning performance and perception of the learners, and the effectiveness of these three modes using four key log features derived from 4956 code submissions across all experimental groups. The analysis results show that learners receiving feedback from GenAI modes had significantly more correct code and fewer code submissions missing essential programming logic than those receiving feedback from adaptive mode. In particular, the hybrid GenAI-adaptive mode achieved the highest number of correct submissions and the fewest incorrect or incomplete attempts, outperforming both the adaptive-only and GenAI-only modes. Questionnaire responses further indicated that GenAI-generated feedback was widely perceived as helpful, while all modes were rated positively for ease of use and usefulness. These results suggest that the hybrid GenAI-adaptive mode outperforms the other two modes across all measured log features.
title_zh: 评估基于知识图谱集成的编程学习系统中自适应与生成式人工智能反馈和建议
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了将大型语言模型（LLM）与检索增强生成（RAG）方法相结合的框架的设计与开发，该框架同时利用知识图谱和用户交互历史。该框架被整合进一个先前开发的自适应学习支持系统中，用于评估学习者的代码、生成形成性反馈并推荐练习题。此外，本研究还考察了学习者在三种教学模式——自适应模式、生成式人工智能（GenAI）模式以及混合的GenAI-自适应模式——中的偏好。通过一项实验研究，比较了三种模式在学习表现和学习者感知方面的差异，并基于来自所有实验组共4956次代码提交的四个关键日志特征进行分析。结果表明，接受GenAI模式反馈的学习者在正确代码数量上显著更多，且缺少必要编程逻辑的代码提交次数明显少于接受自适应模式反馈的学习者。特别是，混合的GenAI-自适应模式在正确提交次数上达到最高，错误或不完整尝试次数最少，优于仅使用自适应模式或仅使用GenAI模式的情况。问卷调查结果进一步显示，学习者普遍认为GenAI生成的反馈具有帮助性，而所有模式在易用性和实用性方面均获得积极评价。这些结果表明，混合的GenAI-自适应模式在所有测量的日志特征上均优于其他两种模式。

title: Training the Knowledge Base through Evidence Distillation and Write-Back Enrichment
authors: Yuxing Lu, Xukai Zhao, Wei Wu, Jinzhuo Wang
abstract: The knowledge base in a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system is typically assembled once and never revised, even though the facts a query requires are often fragmented across documents and buried in irrelevant content. We argue that the knowledge base should be treated as a trainable component and propose WriteBack-RAG, a framework that uses labeled examples to identify where retrieval succeeds, isolate the relevant documents, and distill them into compact knowledge units that are indexed alongside the original corpus. Because the method modifies only the corpus, it can be applied once as an offline preprocessing step and combined with any RAG pipeline. Across four RAG methods, six benchmarks, and two LLM backbones, WriteBack-RAG improves every evaluated setting, with gains averaging +2.14%. Cross-method transfer experiments further show that the distilled knowledge benefits RAG pipelines other than the one used to produce it, confirming that the improvement resides in the corpus itself.
title_zh: 通过证据蒸馏与写回增强训练知识库
abstract_zh: 在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中，知识库通常一次性构建后便不再更新，尽管查询所需的事实信息往往分散在多个文档中，且深藏于无关内容之中。我们认为，知识库应被视为一个可训练的组件，并提出了WriteBack-RAG框架：该框架利用标注样本识别检索成功的位置，分离出相关文档，并将其提炼为紧凑的知识单元，与原始语料库一同索引。由于该方法仅修改语料库，因此可作为一次离线预处理步骤应用，并与任何RAG流水线结合使用。在四种RAG方法、六个基准测试以及两种大语言模型（LLM）骨干架构下，WriteBack-RAG在所有评估场景中均取得提升，平均性能增益达+2.14%。跨方法迁移实验进一步表明，提炼出的知识对生成它的RAG流水线以外的其他系统也具有增益作用，证实了改进效果源于语料库本身的优化。

title: Hardware-Trojan Detection Using GraphGPS
authors: Sho Yoshimi, Yuka Ikegami, Nozomu Togawa
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: With the growing demand for integrated circuits (ICs), design and manufacturing is increasingly outsourced to external vendors, raising the risk of hardware Trojans (HTs) being maliciously inserted by untrusted third parties. An HT is a small, stealthy circuit that can alter functionality, degrade performance, or leak confidential information, making it difficult to detect. This paper proposes an HT detection method based on GraphGPS, a Graph Transformer that integrates MPNN (Message Passing Neural Network) and Transformer layers to capture both local and global structural features of circuit graphs. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, achieving the highest F-score of 0.8322 at 2000 training epochs.
title_zh: 基于GraphGPS的硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 随着对集成电路（IC）需求的不断增长，设计与制造越来越多地外包给外部供应商，这使得硬件木马（HTs）被不可信第三方恶意植入的风险日益增加。硬件木马是一种小型且隐蔽的电路，能够改变电路功能、降低性能或泄露机密信息，因而极难被发现。本文提出一种基于GraphGPS的硬件木马检测方法，GraphGPS是一种图Transformer模型，它结合了MPNN（消息传递神经网络）和Transformer层，能够同时捕捉电路图的局部与全局结构特征。实验结果表明，该方法具有良好的有效性，在2000次训练迭代下达到了最高的F-score 0.8322。

title: Automated Incident Management using Infrastructure-as-Code
authors: Niyazi Gökberk Gündüz, Florian Hofer, Eduardo Guerra, Nabil El Ioini, Claus Pahl
abstract: Enterprises that manage their cloud systems through Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) often push dozens of changes every day. Human operators create a bottleneck in managing incidents in these rapidly changing systems: incident post-mortems reveal detection latencies of tens of minutes and manual recoveries that stretch into hours. An autonomous controller is presented that provides reliable incident self-healing in a Development and Operations (DevOps) environment. This self-healing controller architecture instantiates a common autonomic computing pattern. It provides end-to-end, rule-driven self-healing for an IaC pipeline without the need for specialized hardware or proprietary IT operation platforms. It contributes to handling infrastructure incidents in a reliable and automated fashion.
title_zh: 使用基础设施即代码实现自动化事件管理
abstract_zh: 通过基础设施即代码（Infrastructure-as-Code, IaC）管理其云系统的公司，每天通常会推送数十次变更。在这些快速变化的系统中，人工操作员成为管理事件的瓶颈：事件事后分析显示，检测延迟长达数十分钟，而手动恢复则可能持续数小时。本文提出了一种自主控制器，可在开发运维（DevOps）环境中实现可靠的事件自动修复。该自愈控制器架构采用了一种通用的自适应计算模式，能够在无需专用硬件或专有IT运维平台的情况下，为IaC流水线提供端到端、规则驱动的自动修复能力。该方案有助于以可靠且自动化的方式应对基础设施事件。

title: Evaluating Augmentation Strategies for Large Language Models: A Comparative Study of RAG, CAG, and KAG
authors: Sindhu M, Mohan Kumar J, Vignesh P, Senthil Kumar K, Monishaa N
publish: 2026 Second International Conference on Intelligent Systems for Communication, IoT and Security (ICISCoIS)
