abstract: The present study explores how three approaches improve large language models: We studied the performance of three augmentation methods: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Context Aware Generation (CAG), and Knowledge Augmented Generation (KAG). Our point was to examine how various augmentation techniques perform in problems that require intricate and factual details and specific knowledge. Our appraisement of the quality of the response, factual accuracy, and computational efficiency was based on ROUGE, BLEU and human metrics. As our work reveals, RAG excels in fact-retrieval tasks with a compelling 23 % improvement in factual correctness, while KAG is strong for complex reasoning given its ability to combine structured knowledge. Our results provide concrete evidence in guiding the deployment of augmented language models in different fields.
title_zh: 大型语言模型增强策略评估：RAG、CAG 与 KAG 的比较研究
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了三种方法如何提升大型语言模型的性能：我们研究了三种增强方法——检索增强生成（RAG）、上下文感知生成（CAG）以及知识增强生成（KAG）的表现。我们的重点在于考察不同增强技术在需要复杂且精确事实细节及特定知识的问题中的表现。我们基于ROUGE、BLEU和人工评估指标，对响应质量、事实准确性以及计算效率进行了评价。研究结果表明，RAG在事实检索任务中表现出色，事实正确性提升了23%，而KAG则在复杂推理任务中表现突出，因其能够有效整合结构化知识。这些结果为在不同领域部署增强型语言模型提供了切实的依据。

title: Research on Intelligent Connected Vehicle Safety Technology Based on Fuzzy Testing
authors: Xiuchen Zhan, Mengfei Liu, Xiaodong Zang
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Power, Electronics and Green Energy (ICPEGE)
abstract: With the increasing complexity of automotive electronic systems, in vehicle devices use wireless communication technology to provide various functional services, making cars the main target of hacker attacks. Fuzzy testing, as an effective method for automotive software security testing, can generate a large amount of random data, simulate the behavior of attackers, trigger hidden vulnerabilities or defects in software systems, monitor their abnormal reactions, discover potential errors and security vulnerabilities, and enhance the security of automotive software. This article focuses on the research status and application challenges of fuzzy testing technology in the safety analysis of intelligent connected vehicles. Three methods of fuzzy testing technology are analyzed, and the framework, data types, and workflow of fuzzy testing technology for intelligent connected vehicles are proposed, contributing to the safe development of the intelligent connected vehicle industry.
title_zh: 基于模糊测试的智能网联汽车安全技术研究
abstract_zh: 随着汽车电子系统日益复杂，车载设备采用无线通信技术提供各类功能服务，使得汽车成为黑客攻击的主要目标。模糊测试作为一种有效的汽车软件安全测试方法，能够生成大量随机数据，模拟攻击者行为，触发软件系统中隐藏的漏洞或缺陷，监测其异常反应，发现潜在错误与安全漏洞，从而提升汽车软件的安全性。本文聚焦于模糊测试技术在智能网联汽车安全分析中的研究现状与应用挑战，分析了三种模糊测试技术方法，并提出了面向智能网联汽车的模糊测试技术框架、数据类型及工作流程，为智能网联汽车产业的安全发展提供了有力支持。

title: NPX: Automating Neuromorphic Processor Design from Spike-Based Learning to FPGA Prototyping
authors: Kyuseung Han, Hyeonguk Jang, Sukho Lee, Sung-Eun Kim, Kyudong Hwang, Jae-Jin Lee
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Neuromorphic Processor eXpress (NPX) is a framework designed to facilitate the development of lightweight neuromorphic processors. To evaluate its efficacy, we conducted a case study involving the FPGA-based implementation of a traffic sign recognition system using an NPX-generated neuromorphic processor. The prototype integrates camera input and OLED output, successfully demonstrating full functionality. This case study confirms that NPX substantially streamlines the design and deployment of efficient neuromorphic processors for embedded artificial intelligence applications.
title_zh: NPX：从基于脉冲的学习到FPGA原型设计的神经形态处理器自动化设计
abstract_zh: 神经形态处理器表达（Neuromorphic Processor eXpress，简称NPX）是一个旨在促进轻量级神经形态处理器开发的框架。为评估其有效性，我们开展了一项案例研究，采用NPX生成的神经形态处理器，在FPGA上实现了交通标志识别系统。该原型集成了摄像头输入与OLED输出，成功展示了完整的功能。该案例研究证实，NPX显著简化了高效神经形态处理器的设计与部署过程，适用于嵌入式人工智能应用。

title: Optimizing Prompt Engineering for Large Language Model-Based AI Systems
authors: Naga Sai Mrunal Vuppala, Kishore Subramanya Hebbar, Vishal Sharma, Vandana Roy
publish: 2025 IEEE 1st International Conference on Smart Innovations in Systems, Infrastructure, Mechanical, Power, AI and Computing Technologies (SISIMPACT)
abstract: The advent of large language models (LLMs) may have been a sudden increase in the use, which undoubtedly may intensify the hurry in promoting the precocious and accidental engineering of these models to enhance their accuracy, reliability, and ability to respond to specific contexts. With increased efficiency in different applications and reduced cheating with increased accuracy of performance, the AI systems will finally realise timely plans optimisation. In response to these problems, this study is devoted to the development of effective structure on the principles of automatic tuning prompts, reinforcement learning and passage embedding to the high-quality response as well as to the motivating stimulus to the effective cost of computing power. The integration of cognition together with flexible feedback chains make it possible to respond and understand various demands. There is also evaluation metrics scaling anticipated to evaluate the degree of timeliness-based optimization in terms of relevance, efficiency, and practicality. The strategy is also aimed at decreasing the consumption of energy in turning internationally as per the requirements of designing AI in a sustainable manner. The framework is also more adapt to and more responsive, in comparison with traditional methods, because of comparative validation. With these reactions seeming to suggest the feasibility of streamline the scenario of prompt engineering to redraw the human-AI engagement, and to enable the future smart infrastructures in the form of the LLC-based practices capable of working with the particularly elevated degree of transparency, scale-ability, and domain sustainability. The suggested system resulted in higher performance because it did higher than other methods where the highest degree of accuracy of 95% was through semantic clarity and the lowest at 93% through contextual accuracy.
title_zh: 针对基于大语言模型的AI系统的提示工程优化
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现可能引发使用量的突然激增，这无疑会加剧对这些模型在早期阶段进行仓促且偶然性工程开发的紧迫感，以提升其准确性、可靠性以及对特定情境的响应能力。随着不同应用场景中效率的提高和性能准确性的增强，人工智能系统将最终实现对计划的及时优化。针对这些问题，本研究致力于在自动调优提示、强化学习与段落嵌入等原则基础上，构建有效结构，以生成高质量响应，并有效降低计算资源消耗。认知与灵活反馈链的融合使得系统能够更好地应对和理解多样化需求。同时，预期将引入可扩展的评估指标体系，用于衡量基于时效性的优化在相关性、效率及实用性方面的表现。该策略还旨在减少能源消耗，以符合可持续设计人工智能系统的要求。相较于传统方法，该框架更具适应性和响应性，这一点已通过对比验证得到证实。这些反应似乎表明，简化提示工程场景、重塑人机互动模式成为可能，从而为未来以LLC为基础的智能基础设施提供支持，使其具备更高的透明度、可扩展性以及领域可持续性。所提出的系统表现出更优性能：在各项指标中，最高准确率达到95%，源于语义清晰度；最低准确率为93%，则得益于上下文准确性。

title: AI-Based Framework for Signal Integrity Analysis and Design Optimization in High-Speed Systems
authors: Ravi Sekhar Kommuri
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Emerging Trends in Computing and Communication (ETCOM)
abstract: The paper presents a framework of artificial intelligence to be used to analyze signal integrity and optimize the design of high-speed systems. The suggested methodology uses hybrid neural networks in prediction of key SI parameters, and it is found to scale to 200 folds faster than standard electromagnetic simulations and still maintain accuracy at 2% of full wave accuracy. The framework combines to use of the reinforcement learning to optimize the placement of the components, convolutional neural networks to analyze the eye diagrams in real-time. It has been shown to be <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{3 5}$</tex> percent faster in crosstalk; <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{2 8}$</tex> percent faster in jitter and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{4 2}$</tex> percent faster in design convergence, when validated against PCIE 6.0 and DDR5 interfaces. The given AI-based solution enables the active SI avoidance regarding various high-speed standards, which makes it a potentially transformative solution to the next-generation electronic design.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的高速系统信号完整性分析与设计优化框架
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于人工智能的框架，用于分析信号完整性并优化高速系统的设计。所提出的方法采用混合神经网络来预测关键的信号完整性（SI）参数，其计算速度比传统的电磁仿真快200倍，同时仍能保持与全波仿真相比仅2%的误差精度。该框架结合了强化学习以优化元器件布局，并利用卷积神经网络实现实时眼图分析。经验证，该方法在PCIe 6.0和DDR5接口测试中，相较于传统方法，在串扰方面提速35%，在抖动方面提速28%，在设计收敛方面提速42%。基于人工智能的这一解决方案能够主动规避多种高速标准下的信号完整性问题，因而有望成为下一代电子设计中具有变革性意义的技术。

title: A Hardware-Optimized and Secure Variant of the Lightweight Encryption Algorithm for IoT Applications
authors: Sara Abdulrazzaq Badi, Huda A. Rasool Mohammed, Abdulla Ali Abdulla, Mohammed AlAsad, Aref Al-Qattan, Wael Elmedany
publish: 2025 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT)
abstract: The rapid expansion of the Internet of Things (IoT) across domains such as smart homes, healthcare, and industrial automation has intensified the need for secure yet efficient cryptography on resource-constrained devices. This paper focuses on enhancing the Lightweight Encryption Algorithm (LEA) to increase both its security and efficiency for IoT environments. We first outline key IoT security challenges and position LEA among conventional and lightweight ciphers. Although LEA is attractive for constrained devices due to its ARX (Addition-Rotation-XOR) structure and low resource consumption, it remains vulnerable to side-channel analysis, key recovery attacks, and limited resistance against advanced cryptanalytic techniques. To address these limitations, we propose architectural enhancements to LEA, including modifications to the key schedule, the integration of non-linear S-boxes, and hardware-oriented optimizations such as pipelining and parallel processing. The designs are implemented and evaluated using VHDL on Intel® Quartus® Prime and simulated using ModelSim. We compare the original and enhanced LEA implementations in terms of logic resource usage, fan-out, and structural complexity, and discuss the associated security-performance trade-offs. Results demonstrate that the enhanced LEA significantly improves resistance to differential and linear cryptanalysis, with acceptable overhead for moderately constrained IoT devices. The findings highlight that carefully optimized lightweight ciphers can provide stronger security without sacrificing practicality in real-world IoT deployments.
title_zh: 面向物联网应用的硬件优化且安全的轻量级加密算法变体
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）在智能家居、医疗健康和工业自动化等领域的迅速扩展，对资源受限设备上的安全且高效的密码学提出了更高要求。本文聚焦于提升轻量级加密算法（LEA）的安全性与效率，以更好地适应物联网环境。首先，我们概述了物联网面临的关键安全挑战，并将LEA与其他传统及轻量级密码算法进行对比。尽管LEA因其ARX（加法-旋转-XOR）结构和低资源消耗特性，对资源受限设备具有吸引力，但其仍易受侧信道分析、密钥恢复攻击以及对先进密码分析技术的抵抗能力不足等问题影响。为解决上述局限性，本文提出对LEA的架构改进方案，包括优化密钥调度机制、引入非线性S盒，以及采用面向硬件的优化技术，如流水线设计和并行处理。所有设计方案均使用VHDL在Intel® Quartus® Prime平台上实现，并通过ModelSim进行仿真验证。我们从逻辑资源占用、扇出（fan-out）和结构复杂度等方面，对比分析了原始版本与增强版LEA的性能表现，并探讨了安全性与性能之间的权衡关系。实验结果表明，改进后的LEA在抵御差分与线性密码分析方面有显著提升，同时对中等资源受限的物联网设备而言，开销可接受。研究结果表明，经过精心优化的轻量级密码算法能够在不牺牲实际应用可行性的前提下，为真实世界中的物联网部署提供更强的安全保障。

title: Compile in Seconds and Run on an FPGA with DynaRapid
authors: Andrea Guerrieri, Isaac John Wetenkamp, Chris Lavin, Eddie Hung, Lana Josipović, Paolo Ienne
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: FPGAs are highly versatile devices, but their backend compilation process is significantly time-consuming. While software code compilation may take just a few seconds, FPGA compilation times can often span from several minutes to hours due to the complexity of the underlying toolchain and the ever-growing device capacity. DynaRapid <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> is a very fast compilation methodology that generates, in a matter of seconds, placed-and-routed kernel designs for AMD FPGAs [1] The DynaRapid workflow is illustrated in Figure 1.
title_zh: 数秒内完成编译并在FPGA上运行，使用DynaRapid
abstract_zh: FPGAs 是高度灵活的设备，但其后端编译过程耗时非常长。虽然软件代码编译可能只需几秒钟，但 FPGA 的编译时间通常从几分钟到数小时不等，这是由于底层工具链的复杂性以及器件容量的持续增长所致。DynaRapid<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 是一种极快的编译方法，能够在短短几秒内为 AMD FPGA 生成已布局布线的核设计[1]。DynaRapid 的工作流程如图 1 所示。

title: Automated I.T Ops: Comprehensive Review of IaC Technology
authors: Yugansh Garg, Divya Jain, Shivangee Nagar, Riya Solanki
publish: 2025 IEEE 1st International Conference on Smart Innovations in Systems, Infrastructure, Mechanical, Power, AI and Computing Technologies (SISIMPACT)
abstract: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) has changed how cloud infrastructure is built and maintained, moving away from manual setup toward automated processes defined in code. By writing infrastructure specifications in a codified form, teams can reduce configuration errors, speed up deployment, and make systems easier to reproduce. In this study, IaC is reviewed in the broader setting of cloud computing, with attention to its main principles, common tools, and the challenges that appear in real-world use. Both declarative and imperative styles are discussed, drawing on recent literature, alongside examples of popular tools such as Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, and Ansible. These are examined for provisioning resources and managing configurations. They also handle orchestration across multiple cloud platforms. The comparison considers scalability, DevOps workflow integration, and security. Results show Terraform's strength in multi-cloud deployments. They highlight why security is vital in IaC practices. This is especially important in a DevSecOps approach. It helps practitioners and researchers make infrastructure automated and secure.
title_zh: 自动化IT运维：IaC技术全面综述
abstract_zh: 基础设施即代码（IaC）改变了云基础设施的构建与维护方式，使人们从手动配置转向通过代码定义的自动化流程。通过以代码形式编写基础设施规范，团队能够减少配置错误、加快部署速度，并使系统更易于复现。本研究在云计算的宏观背景下回顾了IaC，重点关注其核心原则、常用工具以及实际应用中出现的挑战。文章讨论了声明式与命令式两种风格，结合最新文献，并以Terraform、AWS CloudFormation和Ansible等流行工具为例，分析其在资源 provision 和配置管理方面的应用，以及跨多个云平台的编排能力。比较分析涵盖可扩展性、DevOps工作流集成和安全性等方面。研究结果表明，Terraform在多云部署方面具有显著优势，同时强调了安全在IaC实践中的重要性，尤其是在DevSecOps方法中。这为从业者和研究人员实现自动化且安全的基础设施建设提供了有力支持。

title: Flip-flop resource expansion method for FPGAs using latches created on look-up tables
authors: Ayumu Ogura, Minoru Watanabe, Nobuya Watanabe
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Applications for pipeline processing or image processing using the latest field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) often require a number of delay-type flip-flops (D-FFs). To increase the flip-flops resource, this paper proposes a flip-flop resource expansion method for current FPGAs using primary and secondary latches created on look-up tables as additional D-FFs. However, this method causes an increase in clock skew because the clock signal must be supplied to the LUT using general-purpose programmable wiring. To address this problem, the additional D-FFs consisting of primary and secondary latches use a two-phase clock signal. This paper presents the demonstration results for a large shift register circuit using this proposed method.
title_zh: 利用查找表创建的锁存器实现FPGA的翻转-翻转资源扩展方法
abstract_zh: 在利用最新现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）进行流水线处理或图像处理的应用中，通常需要大量延迟型触发器（D-FF）。为提高触发器资源的利用率，本文提出一种基于查找表（LUT）上创建主锁存器和次级锁存器以扩展FPGA现有触发器资源的方法，将这些锁存器用作额外的D-FF。然而，该方法由于需通过通用可编程布线将时钟信号送至LUT，导致时钟偏移增加。为解决此问题，所提出的由主锁存器和次级锁存器构成的附加D-FF采用两相时钟信号。本文展示了采用该方法实现的大规模移位寄存器电路的验证结果。

title: Adaptive Semantic Gates for Reliable Multi-Agent LLMs
authors: Lucas G. M. Castro, Myke D. M. Valadão, Waldir S. S. Júnior, Celso B. Carvalho
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems have recently advanced collaborative reasoning, planning, and tool use, yet remain fragile under real-world execution. Prior studies, including recent analyses of why multi-agent LLM systems fail, consistently report coordination breakdowns, unsafe actions, and violations of system-level constraints, while existing defenses rely on heavy alignment methods or static rule-based filters that do not generalize across domains. To address this gap, we introduce ASG, a lightweight, plug-and-play mechanism that monitors semantic drift in real time and selectively blocks high-risk actions during multi-agent execution. We evaluate ASG across symbolic tasks, real-world applications, and multi-step workflows using five configurations and eight seeds. In stable environments, ASG-enhanced agents achieve a team success rate of 91.7% with 26 prevented unsafe actions, demonstrating measurable robustness improvements over traditional pipelines. Under stress-test conditions with noisy states and long-horizon workflows, ASG shifts to a safety-first regime, preventing 33 destructive or contradictory actions while matching or exceeding the stability of non-defensive baselines. These findings show that adaptive gating directly addresses the failure modes highlighted in recent multi-agent analyses and offers a practical, domain-general pathway toward more reliable LLM-based systems.
title_zh: 用于可靠多智能体大语言模型的自适应语义门
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的多智能体系统近年来在协作推理、规划和工具使用方面取得了显著进展，但在真实环境执行中仍表现出脆弱性。以往研究，包括近期对多智能体LLM系统失败原因的分析，普遍报告了协调失效、不安全行为以及违反系统级约束等问题；而现有的防御机制大多依赖于复杂的对齐方法或静态规则过滤器，难以在不同领域间泛化。为弥补这一空白，我们提出ASG——一种轻量级、即插即用的实时监控机制，能够动态检测语义漂移，并在多智能体执行过程中选择性地阻断高风险行为。我们在符号任务、真实应用场景及多步骤工作流中，通过五种配置和八个随机种子对ASG进行了评估。在稳定环境下，ASG增强后的智能体团队成功率达到91.7%，并成功阻止了26次不安全行为，显著提升了传统流水线的鲁棒性。在噪声状态和长周期工作流的压力测试条件下，ASG自动切换至“安全优先”模式，成功防止了33次破坏性或矛盾性操作，同时保持甚至超越了无防御基线系统的稳定性。这些结果表明，自适应门控机制直接应对了近期多智能体系统分析中揭示的关键故障模式，为构建更可靠、跨领域的LLM系统提供了一条切实可行且通用的技术路径。

title: Real-Time Controller Implementation Using dSPACE RTI1202 and MATLAB/Simulink: Architecture, Integration, and Applications
authors: Ashok Kumar, Praveen Tripathy, Sreenath J.G, Ravindranath Adda
abstract: This paper presents a systematic framework for the implementation of real-time control algorithms using the dSPACE RTI-1202 rapid prototyping system integrated with MATLAB/Simulink and control-desk. The proposed workflow covers model-based design, code generation using real-time interface blocks, and automatic deployment onto the DS1202 hardware. Hardware configuration procedures for pulse width modulation (PWM) generation, analog-to-digital/digital-to-analog converter sampling, and general-purpose input output (GPIO) interfacing are explained in detail, along with the integration of controller logic within the Simulink environment. Real-time monitoring, parameter tuning, and data logging through control-desk are demonstrated for efficient experimental validation. To evaluate the system's performance, a notch filter-based PLL is implemented for grid synchronisation under distorted voltage conditions. The proposed setup precisely estimates the grid frequency and phase angle. The results confirm the high-speed processing, precise timing, and robust real-time capability of the dSPACE platform for advanced control and power electronics applications. This work aims to serve as a foundational guide for researchers and engineers seeking to develop and test real-time digital controllers using the dSPACE RTI1202 system.
title_zh: 基于dSPACE RTI1202与MATLAB/Simulink的实时控制器实现：架构、集成与应用
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于dSPACE RTI-1202快速原型系统与MATLAB/Simulink及ControlDesk集成的实时控制算法实现系统化框架。所提出的开发流程涵盖了基于模型的设计、利用实时接口模块进行代码生成，以及自动部署至DS1202硬件平台。文中详细阐述了脉宽调制（PWM）生成、模数/数模转换器采样以及通用输入输出（GPIO）接口等硬件配置步骤，并介绍了在Simulink环境中集成控制器逻辑的方法。通过ControlDesk实现了实时监控、参数调节和数据记录，有效支持实验验证。为评估系统性能，本文实现了一种基于陷波滤波器的锁相环（PLL），用于在电压畸变条件下进行电网同步。实验结果表明，该系统能够精确估计电网频率和相位角。结果验证了dSPACE平台在高速处理、精确时序控制以及强健的实时性能方面的能力，适用于先进控制与电力电子应用。本研究旨在为希望利用dSPACE RTI-1202系统开发和测试实时数字控制器的研究人员与工程师提供基础性指导。

title: Aspo: Constraint-Aware Bayesian Optimization for Fpga-Based Soft Processors
authors: Haoran Wu, Ce Guo, Wayne Luk, Robert Mullins
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown promise in tuning processor design parameters. However, standard BO does not support constraints involving categorical parameters such as types of branch predictors and division circuits. In addition, optimization time of BO grows with processor complexity, which becomes increasingly significant especially for FPGA-based soft processors. This paper introduces ASPO, an approach that leverages disjunctive form to enable BO to handle constraints involving categorical parameters. Unlike existing methods that directly apply standard BO, the proposed ASPO method, for the first time, customizes the mathematical mechanism of BO to address challenges faced by soft-processor designs on FPGAs. Specifically, ASPO supports categorical parameters using a novel customized BO covariance kernel. It also accelerates the design evaluation procedure by penalizing the BO acquisition function with potential evaluation time and by reusing FPGA synthesis checkpoints from previously evaluated configurations. ASPO targets three soft processors: RocketChip, BOOM, and EL2 VeeR. The approach is evaluated based on seven RISC-V benchmarks. Results show that ASPO can reduce execution time for the “multiply” benchmark on the BOOM processor by up to 35 % compared to the default configuration. Furthermore, it reduces design time for the BOOM processor by up to 74 % compared to Boomerang, a state-of-the-art hardware-oriented BO approach.
title_zh: Aspo：面向FPGA软处理器的约束感知贝叶斯优化
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（Bayesian Optimization, BO）在处理器设计参数调优方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，标准的BO方法无法支持涉及类别型参数（如分支预测器类型和除法电路类型）的约束条件。此外，随着处理器复杂度的增加，BO的优化时间也随之增长，这一问题在基于FPGA的软核处理器中尤为显著。本文提出了一种名为ASPO的新方法，通过采用析取形式（disjunctive form），使BO能够处理包含类别型参数的约束。与现有直接应用标准BO的方法不同，ASPO首次针对FPGA上软核处理器设计所面临的挑战，对BO的数学机制进行了定制化改进。具体而言，ASPO通过一种新颖的定制化BO协方差核来支持类别型参数；同时，通过在BO的获取函数中引入潜在评估时间惩罚，并复用先前已评估配置的FPGA综合检查点，显著加速了设计评估过程。ASPO针对三种软核处理器——RocketChip、BOOM和EL2 VeeR进行了实现。基于七个RISC-V基准程序的实验评估表明，与默认配置相比，ASPO可将BOOM处理器上“乘法”基准程序的执行时间最多降低35%；此外，与当前最先进的面向硬件的BO方法Boomerang相比，ASPO可将BOOM处理器的设计时间最多减少74%。

title: Leveraging FPGAs for Homomorphic Matrix-Vector Multiplication in Oblivious Message Retrieval
authors: Grant Bosworth, Keewoo Lee, Sunwoong Kim
publish: 2025 59th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: While end-to-end encryption protects the content of messages, it does not secure metadata, which exposes sender and receiver information through traffic analysis. A plausible approach to protecting this metadata is to have senders post encrypted messages on a public bulletin board and receivers scan it for relevant messages. Oblivious message retrieval (OMR) leverages homomorphic encryption (HE) to improve user experience in this solution by delegating the scan to a resource-rich server while preserving privacy. A key process in OMR is the homomorphic detection of pertinent messages for the receiver from the bulletin board. It relies on a specialized matrix-vector multiplication algorithm, which involves extensive multiplications between ciphertext vectors and plaintext matrices, as well as homomorphic rotations. The computationally intensive nature of this process limits the practicality of OMR. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a hardware architecture to accelerate the matrix-vector multiplication algorithm. The building homomorphic operators in this algorithm are implemented using high-level synthesis, with design parameters for different parallelism levels. These operators are then deployed on a field-programmable gate array platform using an efficient design space exploration strategy to accelerate homomorphic matrix-vector multiplication. Compared to a software implementation, the proposed hardware accelerator achieves a ×13.86 speedup.
title_zh: 利用FPGA实现不经意消息检索中的同态矩阵-向量乘法
abstract_zh: 尽管端到端加密保护了消息内容，但并未保护元数据，而元数据可通过流量分析暴露发送者和接收者的信息。一种可行的保护元数据的方法是让发送者将加密消息发布在公共公告板上，接收者则定期扫描公告板以查找相关消息。不经意消息检索（OMR）利用同态加密（HE）技术改进了这一方案的用户体验，通过将扫描任务委托给资源丰富的服务器，同时保持隐私安全。OMR中的关键步骤是从公告板中对相关消息进行同态检测。该过程依赖于一种专门的矩阵-向量乘法算法，涉及大量密文向量与明文矩阵之间的乘法运算以及同态旋转操作。由于该过程计算开销巨大，限制了OMR的实际应用。为应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种硬件架构来加速矩阵-向量乘法算法。该算法中的同态运算单元采用高层次综合（HLS）实现，并针对不同并行度设计了可配置参数。随后，通过高效的架构探索策略，将这些运算单元部署在可编程门阵列（FPGA）平台上，以加速同态矩阵-向量乘法运算。与软件实现相比，所提出的硬件加速器实现了13.86倍的加速比。

title: AI-Driven Formal Verification for Efficient and Scalable Design Validation
authors: Aparna Mohan, Sivakumar Karuppiah, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: As modern hardware and software designs grow increasingly complex, traditional formal verification techniques face critical challenges, including state space explosion and excessive computational cost, limiting their practical application in large-scale systems. This paper introduces a novel AI-driven formal verification framework that leverages machine learning models to intelligently guide and optimize the verification process. By predicting critical state exploration paths and automatically generating invariants, our approach significantly reduces the verification time and memory usage compared to conventional methods. We integrate a reinforcement learning agent with symbolic model checking, enabling adaptive decision-making that prioritizes relevant design regions while pruning irrelevant paths. Extensive experiments on benchmark hardware designs demonstrate up to 60% improvement in verification speed and substantial scalability gains without compromising correctness guarantees. The proposed method bridges the gap between rigorous formal guarantees and practical scalability, offering a transformative solution for efficient and automated design validation in the era of complex system development.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的正式验证：实现高效且可扩展的设计验证
abstract_zh: 随着现代软硬件设计日益复杂，传统的形式化验证技术面临着状态空间爆炸和计算成本过高等关键挑战，限制了其在大规模系统中的实际应用。本文提出了一种新型的AI驱动形式化验证框架，利用机器学习模型智能引导并优化验证过程。通过预测关键的状态探索路径并自动生成不变式，我们的方法相较于传统方法显著降低了验证时间和内存消耗。我们还将强化学习代理与符号模型检测相结合，实现了自适应决策，优先关注相关的设计区域，同时剪枝无关路径。在基准硬件设计上的大量实验表明，该方法在验证速度上最高可提升60%，并实现了显著的可扩展性提升，同时不牺牲正确性保证。所提出的方案弥合了严格的形式化保证与实际可扩展性之间的差距，为复杂系统开发时代高效、自动化的设计验证提供了一种变革性解决方案。

title: Generative AI Based Network Element Configuration Generator Using Large Language Models
authors: D Dharani, Padmashani R, A. S. Harini, Dharshini V, Kannishree K, Poorvajavani S. K, Prathika A. K
publish: 2026 Second International Conference on Intelligent Systems for Communication, IoT and Security (ICISCoIS)
abstract: The rapid evolution of network protocols and infrastructures requires that different Network Elements (NEs) possess efficient and error-free configuration procedures. The tool utilizes Mistral-7B, a Large Language Model (LLM), to simplify and automate the generation, utilization, and verification of NE configurations. Apart from minimizing manual intervention, the solution provides scalability and flexibility across numerous vendors, protocols, and release versions by translating natural language regulations into executable low-level configurations. Task definition, data representation, prompt engineering, model evaluation, tool integration, and validation are the six steps constituting the core of the proposed framework. The system provides fault detection and automated feedback loops with Element Management Systems (EMS) integration. The beneficial use of LLMs in real- world networking scenarios, with a proof-ofconcept model and addressing translation precision for complex inputs, and ethical concerns were showcased in demonstrating the practicality, effectiveness, and scalability of AI-powered solutions in addressing current networking challenges and revolutionizing network management.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的生成式AI网络单元配置生成器
abstract_zh: 网络协议和基础设施的快速演进要求各类网络单元（NEs）具备高效且无误的配置流程。该工具利用Mistral-7B这一大型语言模型（LLM），简化并自动化了NE配置的生成、使用与验证过程。除了最大限度减少人工干预外，该解决方案通过将自然语言规则转化为可执行的低层配置，实现了在多个厂商、协议及版本发布之间的可扩展性与灵活性。任务定义、数据表示、提示工程、模型评估、工具集成与验证构成了该框架的核心六大步骤。系统还通过与网元管理系统（EMS）的集成，实现故障检测与自动反馈回路。通过一个概念验证模型，展示了LLM在真实网络场景中的有益应用，解决了复杂输入下的翻译精度问题，并探讨了相关伦理关切，充分证明了人工智能驱动方案在应对当前网络挑战方面的实用性、有效性与可扩展性，正推动网络管理的革新。

title: Linear decomposed Image processing in FPGA
authors: Plasin Francis Dias, R. M. Banakar
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Electrical, Electronics, Communication and Computers (ELEXCOM)
abstract: This paper presents hardware implementation of synthetic aperture radar image processing algorithm for polarimetry Linear decomposition method. The proposed image processing technique in this paper uses the analysis of decomposition method to determine the scattering feature of the object detection. An FPGA implementation for the Linear decomposition technique used with image processing to make the system reliable to features the object parameters of detection. The hardware level program was developed for Verilog system modeling implemented using Vertex 5 FPGA from Xilinx employing ISE software. The hardware implementation of the Linear decomposition and software implementation of the techniques are analyzed for qualitative analysis. The proposed approach of hardware solution accuracy is corelated when tested with software implementation using system model. The FPGA model architecture evaluation depicts the greater precision of SAR target evaluation when compared with Python system model.
title_zh: FPGA中的线性分解图像处理
abstract_zh: 本文提出了用于极化线性分解方法的合成孔径雷达图像处理算法的硬件实现。本文所提出的图像处理技术利用分解方法的分析来确定目标探测的散射特性。通过将线性分解技术与图像处理相结合，采用FPGA实现，使系统能够可靠地提取目标检测参数。硬件级程序使用Xilinx公司的Vertex 5 FPGA，基于ISE软件开发，采用Verilog进行系统建模。对线性分解的硬件实现与软件实现方法进行了定性分析。在使用系统模型测试时，所提出的硬件解决方案的准确性与软件实现结果具有良好的相关性。FPGA模型架构评估表明，相较于Python系统模型，其在SAR目标评估方面具有更高的精度。

title: A Method and System for Generating Safety Measure Tickets Based on Relay Protection Secondary Drawings
authors: Susu Pan, Qiongliang Chen, Mingfeng Chen, Junqiang Li, Gang Chen, Bingwei Gao
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Power, Electronics and Green Energy (ICPEGE)
abstract: Aiming at the problems of manual dependence, low efficiency, and high error rate in safety measure ticket (SMT) preparation during relay protection maintenance in power systems, this paper proposes a method and system for generating SMTs based on relay protection secondary drawings. First, the method collects original secondary drawings in multi-source formats (paper scanning, on-site photography, electronic documents), and obtains high-quality target drawings through preprocessing steps including illumination correction, denoising, binarization, and normalization. Then, it extracts drawing feature tensors based on ResNet-50, and uses a modified YOLOv8 model, a hybrid OCR model (ResNet-34 + bidirectional LSTM + Transformer), and a graph neural network (GAT) to realize secondary component localization, circuit text recognition, and connection relationship modeling, generating structured analysis results of the drawings. Finally, it infers and generates compliant SMTs by combining a pre-constructed relay protection safety measure rule base, and realizes iterative optimization of analysis results through verification of actual execution outcomes. Experiments show that the proposed method increases the terminal block detection accuracy by 7.7% compared with the traditional YOLOv8, achieves a terminal number recognition accuracy of 98.5%, and a circuit connection inference accuracy of 96.7%, which significantly improves the standardization and intelligence level of relay protection maintenance operations.
title_zh: 基于继电保护二次图生成安全措施票的方法及系统
abstract_zh: 针对电力系统继电保护检修过程中安全措施票（SMT）编制存在的依赖人工、效率低、错误率高等问题，本文提出一种基于继电保护二次图的SMT生成方法与系统。首先，该方法收集多源格式的原始二次图（包括纸质扫描、现场拍摄照片、电子文档），通过光照校正、去噪、二值化及归一化等预处理步骤，获得高质量的目标图纸。随后，基于ResNet-50提取图纸特征张量，并采用改进的YOLOv8模型、混合OCR模型（ResNet-34 + 双向LSTM + Transformer）以及图神经网络（GAT），实现二次元件定位、回路文字识别和连接关系建模，生成图纸的结构化分析结果。最后，结合预先构建的继电保护安全措施规则库，推理并生成符合规范的SMT，并通过实际执行结果的验证实现分析结果的迭代优化。实验结果表明，所提方法相较传统YOLOv8在端子排检测准确率上提升7.7%，终端编号识别准确率达98.5%，回路连接关系推断准确率为96.7%，显著提升了继电保护检修作业的标准化与智能化水平。

title: AI Copilots for Machine Learning Pipelines: A Comparative Study on Code Quality and Model Performance
authors: Nikos Flamourtzoglou, Eleni Vrochidou, George A. Papakostas
publish: 2025 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT)
abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) continues to reshape, among others, the field of software development, its integration into coding workflows opens up both opportunities and critical questions. The rise of AI-powered coding assistants has introduced a paradigm shift in the way developers approximate programming tasks. This work aims to investigate the efficacy and quality of AI-powered coding in the development of end-to-end machine learning pipelines. More specifically, a comparative study of Amazon Q, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf and Gemini is conducted, by developing two machine learning pipelines, for customer churn prediction and Titanic survival prediction. Each assistant was prompted with the same instructions towards a fair evaluation, and their outputs were assessed using static and dynamic code analysis tools, such as Pylint, Radon, SonarQube and MLflow. The evaluation is focused on code quality, model performance, feature importance, explainability and fairness. Our findings provide practical insights into the coding assistants' strengths and limitations, offering guidance for developers and researchers for the selection of the appropriate tool for machine learning tasks.
title_zh: 机器学习流水线的AI副驾驶：代码质量与模型性能的对比研究
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）持续重塑软件开发等多个领域，其在编码工作流中的集成既带来了机遇，也引发了一系列关键问题。AI驱动的代码助手的兴起，正在改变开发者完成编程任务的方式，带来范式转变。本文旨在研究AI辅助编程在端到端机器学习流水线开发中的有效性与质量。具体而言，通过构建两个机器学习流水线——客户流失预测和泰坦尼克号生存预测，对Amazon Q、GitHub Copilot、Windsurf和Gemini四款代码助手进行了对比研究。所有助手均使用相同的指令进行测试，以确保评估的公平性，并通过静态与动态代码分析工具（如Pylint、Radon、SonarQube和MLflow）对输出结果进行评估。评估重点涵盖代码质量、模型性能、特征重要性、可解释性以及公平性。研究结果为各类代码助手的优势与局限提供了实用洞见，为开发者和研究人员在选择适用于机器学习任务的工具时提供了指导。

title: Versatile Place and Route with Continuous Routing Runtime Prediction and Smart Route Termination
authors: Andrew David Gunter, Steven J E Wilton
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) routing is computationally expensive, taking hours or days with no guarantee of success. While prior work has used machine learning (ML) to guide placement and routing or predict routing outcomes, the process remains challenging to model precisely. This demo presents a new machine learning-based tool that addresses this problem.
title_zh: 具有连续布线运行时预测和智能布线终止的多功能布局布线方法
abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）布线计算成本高昂，通常需要数小时甚至数天时间，且无法保证成功。尽管以往的研究已尝试使用机器学习（ML）来指导布局与布线或预测布线结果，但精确建模这一过程仍然极具挑战性。本次演示展示了一种基于机器学习的新工具，旨在解决这一难题。

title: High Level Synthesis Design for Soft-Input GRAND
authors: Tuomas Aaltonen, Mikko Valkama, Syed Mohsin Abbas
publish: 2025 59th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: Guessing Random Additive Noise Decoding (GRAND) is a universal channel code decoder for short linear block codes. GRAND can be implemented efficiently on hardware and features both hard-input and soft-input variants. Hardware implementations based on GRAND range from those that employ sequential error pattern generation to reduce resource consumption at the expense of higher decoding latency to those that employ parallel error pattern generation to reduce decoding latency at the expense of higher resource utilization. In this work, we present a soft-input Ordered Reliability Bits GRAND (ORBGRAND) hardware implementation framework based on High-Level Synthesis (HLS). The proposed HLS-based methodology simplifies Design Space Exploration (DSE) for ORBGRAND hardware implementations targeted at applications with varying constraints on decoding latency and resource utilization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first-of-its-kind HLS-based soft-input ORBGRAND hardware implementation framework, and the source code for the proposed framework is provided under a permissive open-source license.
title_zh: 软输入GRAND的高层次综合设计
abstract_zh: 猜测随机加性噪声解码（GRAND）是一种适用于短长度线性分组码的通用信道编码译码器。GRAND可在硬件上高效实现，并具备硬输入和软输入两种版本。基于GRAND的硬件实现方式从采用顺序错误图案生成以降低资源消耗但增加解码延迟，到采用并行错误图案生成以减少解码延迟但增加资源占用不等。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于高层次综合（HLS）的软输入有序可靠性比特GRAND（ORBGRAND）硬件实现框架。所提出的基于HLS的方法学简化了针对不同解码延迟与资源利用率约束的应用场景下ORBGRAND硬件实现的设计空间探索（DSE）。据我们所知，这是首个基于HLS的软输入ORBGRAND硬件实现框架，且本文提出的框架源代码已按照宽松的开源许可证提供。

title: FPGA Implementation of a Pipelined RV32IM Processor with Dynamic Branch Prediction
authors: Maharishi Sonwani, Rahul Bhattacharya
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Electrical, Electronics, Communication and Computers (ELEXCOM)
abstract: As fields like AI and robotics continue to expand, the demand for processors that are both powerful and energy-efficient is growing. This imposes the need for the development of such processors at a large scale and at a faster rate, which is possible through open-source development. While the current computing industry is dominated by proprietary technologies and licensed architectures, open-source hardware is rapidly gaining popularity across all industry segments, from high-performance computing to edge-IoT applications.This paper presents the design and FPGA implementation of a 32-bit five-stage pipelined processor core based on the RISC-V open-source Instruction Set Architecture (ISA). The proposed design presents a simple implementation of the RISC-V core, incorporating a 2-bit branch predictor. This makes it easier for beginners to understand the fundamental architecture of a pipelined RISC processor and branch predictors. Additionally, the design has considerable potential for future upgrades. The core is developed using SystemVerilog and has been tested through simulations in Verilator and Xsim, as well as by deploying it on a Basys3 FPGA board.
title_zh: 具有动态分支预测的流水线RV32IM处理器的FPGA实现
abstract_zh:
随着人工智能和机器人技术等领域的持续扩展，对高性能且低功耗的处理器需求日益增长。这促使人们需要大规模、快速地开发此类处理器，而开源开发正是实现这一目标的关键途径。尽管当前计算产业仍以专有技术和授权架构为主导，但开源硬件正迅速在各个行业领域中获得青睐，涵盖从高性能计算到边缘物联网（edge-IoT）应用的广泛场景。

本文提出了一种基于RISC-V开源指令集架构（ISA）的32位五级流水线处理器核心的设计与FPGA实现方案。所提出的架构实现了RISC-V核心的简化版本，并集成了一个2位分支预测器，使初学者能够更直观地理解流水线RISC处理器及分支预测器的基本原理。此外，该设计具备良好的可扩展性，为未来的功能升级预留了充分空间。处理器核心采用SystemVerilog语言开发，并通过Verilator和Xsim进行了仿真验证，同时已成功部署于Basys3 FPGA开发板上进行实际测试。

title: Routino: Accelerating FPGA Routing Through Efficient Memory Representation
authors: Davide Nicolini, Corrado De Sio, Eleonora Vacca, Luca Sterpone
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: The rapid increase in the complexity of Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) is significantly impacting the efficiency of the design implementation flow. In particular, the routing process presents challenges in achieving computational efficiency and reducing time-to-solution due to the increasing on-chip resources and device complexity. This work introduces a novel router that leverages optimized data structures and memory access patterns to minimize memory consumption. Experimental results prove how the proposed approach can significantly reduce time-to-solution, identifying memory consumption as a barrier to achieving scalability and proposing solutions based on FPGA modular architecture to face it, achieving an average memory usage reduction of about 90 % and an average decrease of routing time of 40 %.
title_zh: Routino：通过高效的内存表示加速FPGA布线
abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）复杂度的快速提升，正在显著影响设计实现流程的效率。特别是布线过程，由于芯片上资源数量的增加和器件复杂性的提高，导致在计算效率和缩短求解时间方面面临挑战。本文提出了一种新型布线器，通过优化数据结构和内存访问模式，有效降低了内存消耗。实验结果表明，所提出的方案能够显著减少求解时间，揭示了内存消耗是实现可扩展性的主要障碍，并基于FPGA模块化架构提出了相应的解决方案，实现了平均内存使用量降低约90%，以及平均布线时间减少40%。

title: Developing an Advanced Cross layer Distributed Model for Enhanced Attack Detection Model
authors: Smriti Singhatia, Madhavi Dhingra
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: The increasing interconnectivity of digital ecosystems such as the Internet of Things (IoT), Industry 5.0, and smart grids has led to a surge in sophisticated, distributed, and multi-vector cyber-attacks. Conventional intrusion detection systems (IDS), constrained by single-layer analysis and centralized architectures, are inadequate in addressing these evolving security challenges. This study presents a novel Advanced Cross-Layer Distributed Intrusion Detection Model (ACLD-IDM) that integrates federated learning with an attention-based deep learning mechanism to enable real-time, privacy-preserving, and cooperative threat detection. The proposed model introduces a cross-layer feature fusion strategy that correlates traffic data across the physical, network, and application layers, thereby uncovering hidden attack patterns that traditional single-layer systems often overlook. The ACLD-IDM employs hybrid artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, including recurrent neural networks (RNNs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, graph neural networks (GNNs), and Transformer architectures, to enhance detection accuracy, scalability, and resilience in heterogeneous and resource-constrained environments. Evaluation on benchmark datasets—NSL-KDD, CICIDS2017, and UNSW-NB15—demonstrates the model’s superior adaptability to zero-day and multi-vector attacks while maintaining strong privacy preservation through decentralized federated learning. The novelty of this research lies in its fusion of cross-layer analytics, decentralized intelligence, and attention-based adaptive learning, establishing a robust foundation for next-generation, intelligent, and self-sustaining cybersecurity frameworks capable of defending complex digital infrastructures against emerging threats
title_zh: 开发一种先进的跨层分布式模型以增强攻击检测能力
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）、工业5.0和智能电网等数字生态系统的互联互通日益增强，复杂、分布式且多向量的网络攻击呈爆发式增长。传统入侵检测系统（IDS）受限于单层分析和集中式架构，在应对这些不断演进的安全挑战时已显不足。本研究提出一种新型的高级跨层分布式入侵检测模型（ACLD-IDM），通过融合联邦学习与基于注意力机制的深度学习技术，实现实时、隐私保护且协同的威胁检测。该模型引入跨层特征融合策略，关联物理层、网络层和应用层的流量数据，从而揭示传统单层系统常忽略的隐蔽攻击模式。ACLD-IDM采用混合人工智能（AI）技术，包括循环神经网络（RNN）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、图神经网络（GNN）以及Transformer架构，显著提升了在异构及资源受限环境中的检测精度、可扩展性与鲁棒性。在NSL-KDD、CICIDS2017和UNSW-NB15等基准数据集上的评估结果表明，该模型对零日攻击和多向量攻击具有出色的适应能力，同时通过去中心化的联邦学习机制有效保障了隐私安全。本研究的创新之处在于实现了跨层分析、去中心化智能与基于注意力的自适应学习三者的深度融合，为下一代智能、自维持的网络安全框架奠定了坚实基础，使其能够有效防御复杂数字基础设施所面临的新兴威胁。

title: Pioneering Robust UART Systems Leveraging Riccati Based Sampling for Superior Bit Error Rate Performance
authors: Hilay Patel, Madhav Tandon, Mahesh A. Patel
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Electrical, Electronics, Communication and Computers (ELEXCOM)
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to enhance the reliability of Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter (UART) communication systems under noisy conditions by implementing a Riccati-based sampling method. The UART model has been developed in Verilog to simulate realistic hardware behavior, capturing the effects of bit-flip noise on serial data transmission. Simulations have been conducted to compare the Bit Error Rate (BER) performance of the proposed Riccati based sampling against the traditional fixed sampling with majority voting, across noise probabilities ranging from 0 - 20%. The results demonstrate that the Riccati-based method significantly reduces BER, achieving approximately a 50% improvement at high noise levels, with a BER of 0.0013 compared to 0.0026 for fixed sampling at 20% noise. This enhancement is attributed to the Kalman filter’s ability to estimate bit states from multiple noisy samples, offering a robust solution for error-prone environments. This research validates the approach through detailed simulations, with three professional plots (linear, logarithmic, and scatter with error bars) illustrating the performance gain.
title_zh: 开创性地利用基于Riccati的采样实现鲁棒UART系统，以获得更优的误码率性能
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的方法，通过采用基于Riccati的采样技术，提升在噪声环境下通用异步收发器（UART）通信系统的可靠性。该UART模型使用Verilog语言开发，用于模拟真实的硬件行为，能够捕捉比特翻转噪声对串行数据传输的影响。为评估性能，进行了仿真对比，分析了所提出的基于Riccati的采样方法与传统的固定采样结合多数表决法在噪声概率从0%至20%范围内的误码率（BER）表现。结果表明，基于Riccati的方法显著降低了误码率，在高噪声条件下实现了约50%的性能提升：当噪声水平为20%时，其BER降至0.0013，而传统固定采样方法的BER为0.0026。这一改进归因于卡尔曼滤波器能够从多个含噪采样中准确估计比特状态，从而在易出错环境中提供更稳健的解决方案。本研究通过详尽的仿真验证了该方法的有效性，并绘制了三幅专业图表——线性图、对数图以及带误差棒的散点图，直观展示了性能优势。

title:
F
                    <sup>2</sup>
                    Opt: Novel Fine-Tuning and Folding Algorithms for FPGA-Based DNN Accelerators
authors: Muhammad Shakeel Akram, Bogaraju Sharatchandra Varma, Vincent Meyers, Mehdi Tahoori, Dewar Finlay
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: FPGAs, with their parallelism, low power consumption, and reconfigurability, offer an ideal solution for accelerating quantized deep neural networks (qDNNs) on resource-constrained edge devices. They enable enhanced latency, reduced energy consumption, and improved computational efficiency. However, existing frameworks to accelerate qDNN inference on FPGA face challenges in fine-tuning the deployed models on the FPGAs, as expensive re-synthesis and re-mapping of the accelerator is required. Additionally, the folding algorithm for DNN compute engines in these frameworks introduces substantial padding overheads to align with memory widths. This paper introduces a novel evolutionary algorithm-based hardware-in-the-loop (EvoHIL) framework. EvoHIL uses hardware-level weight bit-flip operations to activate neurons and improve accelerator accuracy without requiring DNN re-training and rebuilding the entire accelerator. We also propose a novel algorithmic optimization (Aopt) for folding across DNN accelerator layers. Aopt optimally aligns folding factors with memory width, eliminating excessive padding overheads and improving throughput while reducing memory and resource utilization. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of these solutions. EvoHIL optimization enhanced the accuracy of a binarized convolutional neural network (BCNN) accelerator to nearly 86%. Aopt delivered significant improvements, including up to 96.77 % padding overhead reduction, 33.2 % increased throughput, and 25 % reduced runtime compared to FINN.
title_zh:
F  
                    <sup>2</sup>  
优化：面向基于FPGA的DNN加速器的新颖微调与折叠算法
abstract_zh: FPGAs凭借其并行性、低功耗和可重构性，为在资源受限的边缘设备上加速量化深度神经网络（qDNNs）提供了理想解决方案，能够显著提升延迟性能、降低能耗并提高计算效率。然而，现有的FPGA上加速qDNN推理的框架在对部署模型进行精细调优时面临挑战，因为需要昂贵的重新综合与重新映射加速器。此外，这些框架中用于DNN计算引擎的折叠算法会引入大量填充开销，以适配内存宽度。本文提出一种基于进化算法的软硬件协同（EvoHIL）框架。EvoHIL利用硬件层面的权重位翻转操作激活神经元，在无需重新训练DNN或重建整个加速器的前提下，有效提升加速器精度。我们还提出一种针对DNN加速器各层的新型算法优化（Aopt），通过将折叠因子最优地匹配内存宽度，彻底消除冗余填充开销，同时提升吞吐量，并降低内存与资源占用。实验结果表明，该方案具有显著效果：EvoHIL优化使二值化卷积神经网络（BCNN）加速器的精度提升至接近86%；Aopt实现了显著改进，包括最高达96.77%的填充开销降低、33.2%的吞吐量提升，以及相比FINN系统25%的运行时间减少。

title: Adaptive SNN-PIM: RL-Driven Triple-Hybrid Architecture for Always-On Consumer AI
authors: Sridevi Navulur, Rangababu Peesapati, Subba Rao S
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: The vision for Embodied AI in consumer electronics (CE) is fundamentally blocked by the Energy Wall, where data movement costs drain battery life, preventing true Always-On operation. We propose a novel Triple-Hybrid Architecture integrating traditional processors (CPU/GPU), energy-efficient Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), and RRAM-based Processing-In-Memory (PIM). Our key innovation is the SNN-PIM Fusion Core, which performs sparse inference at the femtojoule (fJ) scale by eliminating the memory bottleneck. Orchestration is managed by an Intelligent Triple-Mode Scheduler (ITMS) enhanced with a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-Driven Adaptive Agent to dynamically route tasks based on system reliability (temperature) and battery state. Through Python simulation, high-fidelity SystemVerilog/FPGA simulations and emulation on the Intel Agilex 5 SoC, we demonstrate a 160 × power reduction in continuous sensing, validating a projected battery life extension to over 9 months on a standard coin cell. This RL-driven adaptability addresses PIM’s reliability challenges, providing a comprehensive architectural framework for sustainable, next-generation Always-On Consumer Electronics AI devices.
title_zh: 自适应SNN-PIM：面向持续运行消费级人工智能的强化学习驱动三重混合架构
abstract_zh: 消费电子（CE）领域中具身智能（Embodied AI）的愿景，正受到“能源墙”的根本性制约——数据传输的能耗严重消耗电池寿命，阻碍了真正意义上的持续待机运行。为此，我们提出一种创新的三重混合架构，融合传统处理器（CPU/GPU）、能效极高的脉冲神经网络（SNNs）以及基于RRAM的存算一体（PIM）技术。我们的核心创新在于SNN-PIM融合核心，通过消除内存瓶颈，在飞焦（fJ）量级实现稀疏推理，显著降低功耗。任务调度由具备强化学习（RL）驱动自适应代理的智能三模式调度器（ITMS）进行管理，可依据系统可靠性（如温度）和电池状态动态分配任务。通过Python仿真、高保真SystemVerilog/FPGA仿真以及在Intel Agilex 5 SoC上的硬件原型验证，我们实现了连续感知功耗降低160倍，证明在标准纽扣电池供电下，设备续航可延长至9个月以上。该强化学习驱动的自适应机制有效应对了PIM技术的可靠性挑战，为可持续的下一代持续待机型消费电子AI设备提供了一个全面的架构框架。

title: Constructive Application of Prompt-Engineering Patterns to Integrate Generative AI in Higher Education
authors: Patricia Brockmann, Heidi Schuhbauer, D. Moritz Marutschke, Victor V. Kryssanov
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Teacher Education (ICAITE)
abstract: University students increasingly misuse generative AI (GenAI) to cheat on their academic assignments. Instructors need to develop pedagogic strategies which encourage active, authentic learning rather than just the superficial completion of tasks. A constructivist pedagogic concept which utilizes prompt engineering patterns to purposely integrate GenAI into an undergraduate course on databases is described. Students learn to develop structured queries to GenAI, based on prompt engineering patterns. This approach teaches inquiry-based exploration of complex topics in database design and development through iterative interaction with GenAI, which thus serves as an individually personalized tutor. Students learn to use GenAI as a cognitive tool, rather than just copying the answers provided. This approach makes use of scaffolding to empower students to master complex database principles.
title_zh: 提示工程模式在高等教育中整合生成式人工智能的建设性应用
abstract_zh: 大学生越来越滥用生成式人工智能（GenAI）来在学术作业中作弊。教师需要制定教学策略，鼓励学生进行积极、真实的学 习，而非仅仅表面完成任务。本文介绍了一种建构主义教学理念，该理念通过运用提示工程模式，有目的地将GenAI融入本科数据库课程中。学生学习如何根据提示工程模式，向GenAI提出结构化查询。这种教学方法通过与GenAI的迭代互动，引导学生开展基于探究的学习，深入探索数据库设计与开发中的复杂议题，使GenAI成为个性化的学习导师。学生不再只是复制GenAI给出的答案，而是学会将其作为认知工具加以使用。该方法借助支架式教学，帮助学生逐步掌握复杂的数据库原理。

title: A Framework for Automated PCB Inspection through Gerber Files Comparison using Computer Vision and LLM
authors: Elton Alencar, Janderson Lira, Pablo H. U. de Pinho, Jair de Almeida, Luziane L. S. Arouca, Daniel Lins Da Silva, Marcel Silva, Agemilson Pimentel
publish: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Consumer Electronics (ICCE)
abstract: Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs) play a critical role in the manufacturing of electronic devices, requiring accurate component placement and precise layer connections. Visual inspection ensures the correctness of PCB layouts, but manual comparison between design versions is time-consuming and prone to human error. In this paper, an AI-driven hybrid framework that integrates Computer Vision (CV) techniques with Large Language Model (LLM) is proposed to automate the detection and reporting of design changes across Gerber files. The system converts Gerber data into images, performs pixel-wise comparison using Digital Image Processing (DIP) methods, and classifies differences into additions, removals, or modifications. The extracted discrepancies are then described and summarized through technical text automatically generated by gemma3:4b, a pre-trained LLM. Experimental results with 186 comparisons demonstrated an average total processing time of 52.6 s per analysis, with report generation accounting for most of the execution time (37 s). The approach achieved consistent and accurate detection of geometric variations, reducing inspection time and reliance on multiple third-party tools. This framework provides a reliable and extensible foundation for automated PCB inspection, contributing to smarter, AI-assisted manufacturing workflows in consumer electronics, providing a centralized service that can be integrated into the company’s local infrastructure.
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉与大语言模型的Gerber文件对比自动化PCB检测框架
abstract_zh: 印刷电路板（PCB）在电子设备制造中发挥着至关重要的作用，其生产要求元件位置精准以及各层连接精确无误。视觉检查有助于确保PCB版图的正确性，但人工对比不同设计版本既耗时又容易出错。本文提出一种基于人工智能的混合框架，将计算机视觉（CV）技术与大语言模型（LLM）相结合，实现对Gerber文件间设计变更的自动化检测与报告。该系统将Gerber数据转换为图像，利用数字图像处理（DIP）方法进行像素级比对，并将差异分类为新增、删除或修改三类。随后，通过预训练的大语言模型 gemma3:4b 自动生成技术文本，对提取出的差异进行描述和总结。在186次对比实验中，平均每次分析总处理时间为52.6秒，其中报告生成占用了大部分时间（约37秒）。该方法实现了几何变化的一致且准确检测，显著缩短了检查时间，并减少了对多种第三方工具的依赖。本框架为PCB自动化检测提供了可靠且可扩展的基础，推动了消费电子领域更智能、AI辅助的制造流程发展，可作为集中式服务集成到企业本地基础设施中，助力智能制造升级。

title: Analysis on intelligent DevOps by using AI-Powered automation for cloud application management
authors: G Divya, Kasarla Priyanka, L Chandra Sekhar Reddy, Shaik Munawar, M.Mohammed Ibrahim, Balaji Kannan
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: The combination of greater cloud computing pace and DevOps adoption allowed software deployment and monitoring as well as scaling to undergo automated enhancement. The current DevOps approaches using human intervention rules during automation process cause management inefficiencies in complex cloud-native systems. The research explores the integration of Machine Learning with Artificial Intelligence features into DevOps methodologies to develop autonomous healing capabilities through combining predictive diagnostic information with automated problem-fixing systems. When AI technologies are integrated under the AIOps framework companies acquire automatic anomaly detection tools and predictive resources management features and system failure assessment tools which improve their CI and CD deployment processes. The implementation of artificial intelligence-based monitoring systems enables organizations to receive genuine performance data and security protection functionality and cloud application scaling features. Automated correction systems initiated through programming helped identify sources of problems while reducing operational costs and system uptime losses.A DevOps platform created through AI automation enables deployment management and monitoring in addition to incident resolution as cloud-native functions. The analysis presents relevant research data and experimental evidence to prove how deployment operations benefit from AI and system reliability increases alongside the reduction of operational costs. Administrative roles experience substantial performance improvement through DevOps automation that employs AI because the system removes manual work and generates consistent reliable operations. The results indicate that cloud-native application control will utilize AI-driven DevOps that permits autonomous management along with self-adaptive operation of cloud platforms.
title_zh: 基于AI驱动自动化实现云应用管理的智能DevOps分析
abstract_zh: 云计算速度的提升与DevOps的广泛应用，使得软件部署、监控以及扩展能力实现了自动化优化。然而，当前采用人工干预规则进行自动化的DevOps方法，在复杂的云原生系统中导致了管理效率低下。本研究探讨将机器学习与人工智能功能融入DevOps方法论，通过结合预测性诊断信息与自动化问题修复系统，构建具备自主修复能力的智能运维体系。在AIOps框架下集成AI技术后，企业可获得自动异常检测工具、预测性资源管理功能以及系统故障评估能力，从而显著优化其持续集成（CI）和持续交付（CD）流程。基于人工智能的监控系统实施，使组织能够获取真实性能数据、安全防护功能以及云应用的弹性伸缩能力。通过编程触发的自动化纠错系统，不仅有助于快速定位问题根源，还有效降低了运营成本和系统停机时间。通过AI自动化构建的DevOps平台，不仅能实现部署管理与监控，还能完成事件响应等云原生功能。分析结果展示了相关研究数据与实验证据，证明AI的应用使部署操作获益良多，系统可靠性显著提升，同时运营成本大幅降低。借助AI驱动的DevOps自动化，管理角色的工作效率得到显著改善，因为系统消除了大量手动操作，实现了稳定可靠的运行。研究结果表明，未来的云原生应用控制将依赖于AI驱动的DevOps，实现对云平台的自主化管理与自适应运行。

title: DEFA: Design Space Exploration for FPGA Overlay Accelerators Through Frequency Prediction and Bayesian Optimization
authors: Qilong Zhu, Yunfei Dai, Shiyan Bi, Huizhen Kuang, Dylan Wang, Wenbo Yin, Lingli Wang
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: In edge AI inference, FPGAs demonstrate superiority in performance-area balance. FPGA Overlay Accelerators (FOAs) are programmable accelerators implemented on FPGAs, typically highly parameterized to enable flexible hardware realization. These parameters, varying across a wide design space, have a significant impact on performance and require efficient Design Space Exploration (DSE). However, current frameworks struggle to accurately predict performance metrics like maximum frequency and fail to fully explore the design space, limiting DSE's effectiveness. In this paper, we propose a DSE framework for FOA (DEFA) based on Bayesian optimization, providing more effective and comprehensive DSE. To address complex parameter interdependencies in FOA, a dependency-aware design space modeling approach (DAM) is proposed. This approach applies fine-grained pruning to the parameter space while addressing dependency constraints. Based on this pruned parameter space, we develop a custom regression predictor (CREP) for maximum frequency using LightGBM, significantly enhancing performance estimation accuracy. Furthermore, the search efficiency is improved through enhanced Latin hypercube sampling and the Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator. We use the proposed framework to optimize an FOA template, Intel FPGA AI Suite. The Pearson correlation coefficient of CREP's predictions regarding the maximum frequency of accelerator instances achieves 0.87. In the throughput optimization experiment, the proposed DSE framework improves 30.16 % compared to the architecture optimization functionality provided by Intel FPGA AI Suite across the given 10 benchmarks on average. In the areathroughput trade-off optimization experiment, compared with FPGA AI Suite, the proposed DSE framework improves 5.01 % in frequency, 18.48 % in throughput and 21.60 % in area.
title_zh: DEFA：通过频率预测与贝叶斯优化进行FPGA叠加加速器的设计空间探索
abstract_zh: 在边缘AI推理中，FPGA展现出性能与面积之间的优越平衡。FPGA叠加加速器（FOA）是基于FPGA实现的可编程加速器，通常具有高度参数化特性，以支持灵活的硬件实现。这些参数覆盖广泛的設計空間，对性能有显著影响，因此需要高效的設計空間探索（DSE）。然而，当前框架在准确预测最大频率等性能指标方面存在困难，且未能充分探索設計空間，限制了DSE的实际效果。本文提出一种基于贝叶斯优化的FOA DSE框架（DEFA），实现了更高效、更全面的设计空间探索。为应对FOA中复杂的参数依赖关系，我们提出了一个依赖感知的設計空間建模方法（DAM），该方法在满足依赖约束的前提下，对参数空间进行细粒度剪枝。基于剪枝后的参数空间，我们采用LightGBM构建了定制化的最大频率回归预测器（CREP），显著提升了性能估计的准确性。此外，通过改进的拉丁超立方采样和树结构帕尔岑估计器（Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator），进一步提高了搜索效率。我们利用所提出的框架对Intel FPGA AI Suite中的FOA模板进行了优化。CREP对加速器实例最大频率的预测结果与实际值之间的皮尔逊相关系数达到0.87。在吞吐量优化实验中，相较于Intel FPGA AI Suite提供的架构优化功能，本DSE框架在10个基准测试上的平均吞吐量提升达30.16%。在面积-吞吐量权衡优化实验中，相比FPGA AI Suite，本框架在频率上提升5.01%，吞吐量提升18.48%，面积效率提升21.60%。
